Trùm Sò is absurdly rich yet notoriously stingy, obsessed with money to the point of denying himself even the simplest pleasures.  His tightly controlled world collapses when a large amount of his gold suddenly disappears. Driven by greed rather than reason, he is pulled into a chaotic heist alongside two unlikely allies: Thị Hến, a sharp-witted widow, and Tôm Hùm, a flamboyant drifter.

title: From the Beyond: High Strangeness in the Bennington Triangle
overview: Deep in the forests of Vermont, the Bennington Triangle has become a hotspot for the unexplainable-UFO sightings, Bigfoot encounters, eerie light anomalies, and a string of mysterious disappearances that defy logic. This chilling documentary blends dramatic, stylized recreations with gripping eyewitness interviews to unravel the dark and perplexing history of this enigmatic region. Could there be a connection between these strange phenomena, or is the Bennington Triangle simply a magnet for the unknown? Through expert analysis, firsthand accounts, and immersive storytelling, The Bennington Triangle dares to explore the truth hidden within the shadows of New England's most haunted wilderness.

title: A Guardian's Heart
overview: Jake Bishop has been an exemplary Executive Protection Medic with a distinguished career but life hasn't always been that way for him. There have been miscues, failures, wrong turns and one day he just decides to walk away from it all. His ex boss wants to hire him for one final mission together and when Jake senses redemption for all life's twist and turns, will they survive and can the thought of love save him just in time from a path of destruction. Only time will tell.

title: Miocardio
overview: Pablo is in a crisis. In a morning when he hits rock bottom, his phone rings mysteriously. It's Ana, the girl who broke his heart more than fifteen years ago. Over the course of a day, Pablo will be able to resolve pending affairs and finish writing a chapter of his life... or maybe not...

title: Isaiah's phone
overview: In April 2022, a student at Milbrook High filmed himself committing a horrific act of violence.  His phone was seized by police as evidence.  Its contents have remained unseen... until now.

title: Death of a Lion
overview: A  former leader in the Black Lion Party for International Solidarity shares his story of found family, loss, and transcendence. Shot over the course of two months, this short documentary provides a glimpse into the dynamics of modern American revolutionary movements.

title: Value
overview: An intimate animated portrait of one individual's journey through anxiety and isolation, unfolding into a quiet, hard-earned sense of self-acceptance.

title: Pother Pechal
overview: Uma, a new writer meets Bayejid, an auto driver. In the middle of life’s struggles, she discovers his hidden talent for singing. Through dreams and kindness, they inspire each other, and their story begins to move in a new direction.

title: Chasing Utopia
overview: Chasing Utopia is a feature documentary asking the question everyone should be asking: will AI be humanity's greatest achievement or its greatest downfall? Mo Gawdat spent two years travelling the world - from Shanghai to Riyadh, New York to London - to find out, engaging with the leading minds shaping our future including Yoshua Bengio, Fei-Fei Li, Geoffrey Hinton, Max Tegmark, Elon Musk and Sam Altman. The result is a film that might change the way you see everything

title: Descend Beyond
overview: Talbot Grimes, a young man filled with unconstrained ambitions, secures himself a position within the British East India Company. He discovers another realm spilling into their own, which sparks an unconventional fascination in him.

title: Yohanna
overview: A young nun's encounter with the underworld of child labor in Sumba restores her sense of purpose in life.

title: Kavi
overview: On a still morning by a lake, a fading poet reflects on a world that celebrates stories yet forgets the ones who write them. As memory and disillusionment begin to blur, he finds himself at a fragile crossroads to continue writing despite being unheard, or to slowly disappear into the silence he fears. This is a film about loneliness, creation, and the quiet cost of being a storyteller.

title: This Place
overview: An introspective journey of a Filipino daughter attending the funeral of her estranged OFW father in a city in Japan that is rebuilding from the aftermath of the March 2011 tsunami.

title: Cha Garam
overview: After completing her MBBS, Irin unexpectedly arrives at a remote, network-less tea estate in Sylhet, where healthcare depends mostly on paracetamol. Her friend Mithu, an aspiring artist and architecture student, joins her from Dhaka. There, they discover the harsh realities of tea workers’ lives and meet Nandini, a bright girl who dreams of becoming a doctor. Together, they help her chase that dream.

title: Odds On
overview: In a pitch black room, 6 strangers are forced to compete with one another by an unsettlingly nonchalant individual. Each player is a contender in a high stakes game of russian roulette, as the story unfolds, fear and paranoia take over as each player is picked off one at a time. With no escape and a silent enforcer watching from the shadows, the group is pushed to the brink of sanity

title: Aliens
overview: Two members of a foreign species crash land near a prep school dormitory, invading it and attacking the students within. But nothing is quite as it seems.

title: I Really Love My Husband
overview: When a woman grows disillusioned with her golden-boy husband during their tropical honeymoon, she recruits an enigmatic expat to spice things up—for better or worse.

title: Power to the People: John & Yoko Live in NYC
overview: John & Yoko/Plastic Ono Band with Elephant's Memory and Special Guests performed these now-legendary sold-out One To One concerts to a combined audience of 40,000 people, raising over $1.5M for children with intellectual and developmental disabilities. They were the only full-length concerts John Lennon (with Yoko Ono) performed after leaving The Beatles.

title: Maple Leaf Pro: Multiverse 2026
overview: MLP: Multiverse 2026 – The Global Showcase at Slam Fest Las Vegas live on TrillerTV, streaming straight from the iconic Pearl Theater within Palms Casino Resort.  Multiverse stands as a centerpiece of Slam Fest 2026, the five-day global wrestling festival. This event brings the collaborative vision of Scott D'Amore to life, featuring the elite talent of MLP alongside champions and stars from the world's leading promotions.

title: Dr. Bolder and the Iron Soldier
overview: a skilled doctor accidentally fixes a war machine

title: DRAGON BALL Z: BUU, GOD OF DESTRUCTION
overview: Majin Buu is back… and this time, he has the power of a God of Destruction.  When a terrifying cosmic disturbance shakes the universe and Beerus suddenly disappears, Goku realizes the nightmare is real: Majin Buu has returned, stronger and more dangerous than ever. As entire worlds begin to go silent, Earth becomes the next target, forcing Goku, Vegeta, Gohan, and Piccolo into a desperate battle against a power that should never exist.  Dragon Ball Z: Buu, God of Destruction is a live-action fan film inspired by classic DBZ, built around god-level stakes, brutal fights, emotional character moments, and a terrifying “What if Buu Absorbed Beerus” premise: what happens when Buu evolves beyond anything the Z Fighters have faced before?

title: Blood Witch
overview: Centuries after being killed for witchcraft, a mother and daughter are resurrected. They seek revenge on descendants of those responsible. As locals disappear, two journalists investigate the mysterious events.

title: My 2007
overview: For her birthday, Kira, a grey blur, tries to break free from the drabness of her provincial town and fit in with a group of trendy outsiders However, a series of sudden events and painful revelations force her to reconsider her values.

title: The Twitcher
overview: A pompous musician goes down the rabbit hole when he puts his career on hold to take up birdwatching

title: Leave the Cat Alone
overview: Plagued by insomnia and lethargy, Mori lets time drift aimlessly, unable to create any meaningful music, all while uneasily sharing a home with his wife, Maiko, a successful and driven photographer. When Mori and his former lover, Asako, reunite by chance and catch up, they confront different versions of the past within their own recalled memories. After they part ways, Asako comes home to a warm meal lovingly prepared by her partner, and a rekindled desire to paint again. At the same time, Mori visits Maiko’s exhibition, and discovers scenes of his own daily life, captured within her affectionate frames.

title: Hard Redemption
overview: Korean American teenager Bryan wants out of his ruthless gang, the Goblins, setting the stage for gang retribution. On his first day of GED summer school for at-risk students, Bryan meets his new teacher, a tough ex-con and ex-gang member, a middle-aged man on a positive new course in life.

title: The Metropolitan Opera: Eugene Onegin
overview: Tchaikovsky’s many moods—tender, grand, melancholy—are all given free rein in Eugene Onegin. The opera is based on Pushkin’s iconic verse novel, which reimagines the Byronic romantic anti-hero as the definitive bored Russian aristocrat caught between convention and ennui; Tchaikovsky, similarly, took Western European operatic forms and transformed them into an authentic and undeniably Russian work. At the core of the opera is the young girl Tatiana, who grows from a sentimental adolescent into a complete woman in one of the operatic stage’s most convincing character developments.

title: Nausicaa
overview: A girl, whose father is from Greece, studies ancient art in France. The film was made for television but never broadcast for political reasons related to its portrayal of Greeks. A work print was screened in Belgium in 1971, and the film is now available in reconstructed form.

title: Vittorio De Sica – La Vie in Scene
overview: A documentary feature film about Vittorio De Sica, one of the greatest masters of world cinema. Through a new access to his family, rare archives and testimonies of contemporary artists and filmmakers from the entire world, the ilm retraces his life, his work and legacy. An intimate portrait of an author able to transform the observation of the real in an universal emotion and reveals the modernity of a gaze which keeps on illuminating cinema and our way of seeing the world.

title: BANGCHELLA
overview: BIGBANG in coachella 2026.

title: Hugo 24
overview: Hugo is 23 and still hasn't grown up. On the eve of his 24th birthday, he faces adulthood: he's unemployed, but goes to an interview at a real estate agency, a dream job that would allow him to wear a suit, something that reminds him of his absent father. He carries a deep fear of abandonment: his mother is in prison, his girlfriend is leaving, and his family is falling apart. When his landlord threatens to evict him in 24 hours, he begins a race against time that will mark his definitive step into adulthood.

title: SIGNAL
overview: A pair of astronauts on a rescue mission discover a strange signal coming from deep space.

title: Monkey Business
overview: Joaquin, Brujo and Luismi, three neighbourhood scoundrels, meet again after twenty years. Brujo and Luismi are still unemployed while Joaquin swears he has become an important businessman. However, one day he receives a notification that his mother's house has been repossessed for a loan. He will try to get the money he neds to avoid eviction, but the brilliant ideas of Brujo and Luismi will end up plunging Joaquin even deeper into misery

title: FLAWS : i FeeL Alive When i Sleep
overview: Dream, a young actor, becomes addicted to lucid dreaming as a way to escape the pressure and public hatred of being labeled as a Nepo Baby. However, he is forced to confront a horrifying reality when his actions in dreams begin to affect the real world.

title: The Taylor Swift Interview
overview: The New York Times Magazine polled more than 250 music insiders and gathered six Times critics to choose the 30 Greatest Living American Songwriters. One of the artists who made the list was Taylor Swift. Popcast co-host and Times culture reporter Joe Coscarelli met with Swift in Los Angeles to talk about the craft of songwriting. In this 30-minute interview, she discusses her process, the stories behind some of her biggest hits, her love of a “rant bridge,” and how life in the public eye shapes the stories she tells in her songs.

title: Kanaval
overview: In the mid-1970s, Rico, a 9-year-old Haitian boy, was brutally torn from his native land  along with Erzulie, his mother, to a strange planet called Canada. Since their arrival, a  distance seems to have grown between mother and son. To regain the love of his mother, Rico will have to understand this New World populated by individuals with strange habits  and customs. Fortunately for him, he can count on Kana, his imaginary friend who comes  straight out of Haitian mythology.

title: Los justos
overview: Atilio begins a new life when his daughter moves him to a nursing home, where he meets Beto, a clever and resourceful man. Together, they sneak out to visit Atilio’s late wife’s grave and accidentally witness a money laundering operation in the cemetery, involving hidden cash in a coffin. Inspired by the chance to change their lives, Atilio, Beto, and Doña Rosa—a sharp woman from the home—team up to investigate the scheme, hoping to seize the opportunity and find new purpose.

title: Abracadaver
overview: To save their father's life, three siblings skilled in magic, escapism, and swindling must steal a priceless mummy from an old hacienda during the "Night of the Dead" party. Success means fortune and peace; failure brings severe consequences.

title: Drama Killer
overview: A bizarre hitman with a soft spot for animals and a taste for cowboy gear gets handed an outrageous assignment. A gambler and a jockey have cooked up a scheme: rig the race, push a sluggish long shot to a shocking win, and walk away with a fortune from the racetrack owner’s pocket. But the owner gets wise to the plan. Determined to shut it down before it starts, he brings in the killer to clean house. Now faced with a fat payday and a moral dilemma, the hitman stands at a crossroads — stick to the job, or help the poor sap escape the crosshairs? One horse sets off a chain reaction that lays bare the greed and humanity buried in every heart.

title: The Hybrids
overview: A thought-provoking documentary examining personal accounts of alleged alien abduction, hybridization, and non-human identity.

title: Open All Hours: Inside Out
overview: Retrospective celebrating the shop sitcom, including a new short scene starring David Jason. Also features Diane Morgan, Johnny Vegas, Tim Healy and Charlotte Barker.

title: Demonic Plastic Surgery
overview: When beauty becomes an obsession, Thanh takes a job at a remote cosmetic clinic to save her comatose lover. But the place soon turns into a nightmare, filled with dark rituals, wandering spirits, and a horrifying secret hidden beneath its glamorous facade. Drawn into the sinister “spirit binding” ritual, Thanh must face a life-or-death choice: remain in the underworld with the one she loves, or fight to escape the grip of a malevolent force.

title: Edinburgh '25
overview: I went to Edinburgh last summer and, in retrospect, realised it was the happiest I was all year. So I went back to Edinburgh at New Year's and attempted to reconstruct the experience through film.

title: Pentos
overview: An animated origin story of an original superhero, created by Samuel Scotland, Pentos.

title: Kidilam Paru
overview: Chanthu sees marrying Paru as his chance to move abroad, while Sharath, an aspiring influencer, hopes to connect over shared interests. Things quickly spiral into a series of funny misadventures and unexpected bonds

title: Neang Phuong: The 1990s
overview: Khmer horror film.

title: Fatal Contact
overview: A traumatized psychic, after receiving a vision from beyond the grave, must use her ability once again to confront a killer.

title: El río que nos lleva
overview: In 1946, an irishman joins a group of 'gancheros' (wood workers) while they drive wood thru the Tajo river, discovering human solidarity.

title: Bloodstained Circuitboards
overview: A long dead vampire resurrected into an AI model by a CEO seeking infinite power  A lone graphic designer attempts to evade the clutches of the vampire

title: When the Night Falls
overview: Follows the incredible story of a 1942 effort to to save over 100 Jewish children from a deportation camp just outside of Lyon.

title: Eraserheads: Combo on the Run
overview: When the Eraserheads formed in 1989, their music swept the country. But the REAL story behind the group has remain untold. Until now...

title: In the Prime of Life
overview: Set in early 1900s China, this film follows young Mao Zedong, Cai Hesen, Xiang Jingyu, and Yang Kaihui as they study at Hunan First Normal School. It captures their quest for knowledge, purpose, and a revolutionary path to save the country.

title: letter to a dead bird
overview: this is the letter to a deadbird...

title: IMP. LIVE TOUR 2026 MAGenter
overview: IMP.'s first nationwide arena tour, IMP. LIVE TOUR 2026 MAGenter, drew around 200,000 fans across six major cities in Japan. Now, experience the energy, excitement, and unforgettable moments of their powerful live performance at Yokohama Arena, brought to you exclusively on Prime Video for audiences around the world.*Content may differ from the original version.

title: Abandonados
overview: Abandonados, a case by Carles Porta, revisits one of the most unsettling episodes in recent Spanish history. Forty years after being abandoned at a train station in Barcelona, three siblings embark on an investigation to uncover their identity and their past. Through testimonies, archival material, and a long-term investigation, the work reflects on memory, identity, and the search for truth.

title: Voidance
overview: To join the elite ATIC Guard, Alana Toro must pass one final test: enter a simulation, prevent a terrorist attack, and prove her loyalty. Every mistake resets the clock. Every death disappears - except in her memory, where the weight keeps building. The more Alana learns, the more she begins to question the organisation she fought so hard to join.

title: Metabolizer
overview: An isolated teenager's parasocial relationship with an uncanny sitcom spirals out of control when a gruesome tragedy is broadcasted live.

title: Divine Comedy
overview: Bahram is a 40-year-old filmmaker who’s spent his entire career making films in Turkish-Azeri, none of which have ever been screened in Iran. His latest work, once again denied permission by the Ministry of culture, pushes him to the edge of defiance. With his sharp-tongued, Vespa-riding producer Sadaf by his side, he embarks on an underground mission to showcase his film to an Iranian audience, dodging government censors, absurd bureaucracy, and his own self- doubts.

title: Fault
overview: A college tennis star's life spirals out of control.

title: The Illusion of a Quiet Night
overview: Filmed during one night in July 2025 by forty filmmakers and hundreds of citizens, The Illusion of a Quiet Night paints a vast collective portrait of war-torn Ukraine. Between fear and exhaustion, moments of joy and scenes of the ordinary day to day, we watch as life goes on in spite of everything, witnessing the resilience of a nation gripped by uncertainty.

title: One Wish Willow: An Obsession Parody
overview: After stumbling upon a mysterious item that has the ability to grant you one wish, Chris attempts to save his friendship when he finds out his friend is moving to New York.

title: Deadly
overview: Walter, a farmer living in the mountains, hides an undercover cop hunted by criminals. The arrival of his daughter, Daria unearths Walter's buried past. In the silence of the mountain, a brutal reckoning erupts, where redemption comes through fire and blood.

title: L'oratore
overview: Felice is a twenty-year-old boy from a working-class neighborhood. He buys a grand piano with money from a loan shark and with the help of Noemi, a young girl of the same age he met in the library, he plays in the squares of Campania for passers-by and tourists. The security guard Enzo, after an argument, destroys his piano into many pieces. Chased by loan sharks, he finds himself in the back of a church. He is given a jacket and tie and is sent to the altar in front of the dead man's relatives. He begins to make a speech in commemoration of a deceased person he doesn't even know, but the words flow spontaneously, cleanly, moving and exciting. After that speech he will become the funeral boy, the orator.

title: A Light That Never Goes Out
overview: Successful classical flutist Pauli returns to his small hometown after a breakdown. Reconnecting with old schoolmate Iiris, he is drawn into experimental music. Pauli, who has always sought perfection, is drawn to her chaotic energy, and finds comfort in their sonic experiments.

title: Las Tres Sisters
overview: Following in the footsteps of their beloved grandmother, three Mexican-American sisters take an adventure through Mexico to complete a traditional pilgrimage and repair their relationship.

title: The Barn Part III
overview: Years after the events of 'The Barn Part II', the group is still left in fear that the evil three might come back to finish the harvest once and for all.

title: To Do
overview: In their last summer before their senior year of college, Zach and Matt realize they’re on the brink of losing their freedom forever. In a last ditch effort to reconnect with each other, they go on a road trip to do all the things they always said they would.

title: SELF+TAPE
overview: Three actors audition for the same career-defining lead role in a major British romcom, all from the discomfort of their own homes.

title: Straight Guy Watches Gay Porn for the First Time
overview: When Janek, a straight Polish guy watches gay porn for the first time, his world is turned upside down. Battling with unsettling new thoughts, he is put into a journey of self-discovery.

title: Dark Beginnings
overview: In December 2024, the 20th President of the Republic of Korea declared emergency martial law. Korean society has once again split into left and right, engaging in extreme hatred and violence. I wanted to explore this sentiment of hatred that is pervasive throughout our society.

title: Meet Saybika
overview: Ye, who had always had the same dreams, begins having diverse dreams after accidentally discovering a mysterious dictionary. Realizing that she was receiving signals from someone every time she opened the dictionary, Ye discovers that her dreams were actually signals from Rainy.

title: Wizard of Death: Tinman's Rise
overview: A family outing spirals into a fight for survival against the Tin Man, a heart-hungry machine risen from the ruins of Oz.

title: Firecracker
overview: Jaeron, whose birthday is the Fourth of July, celebrates every year watching the fireworks with his family. However, on his 12th birthday, a serious thunderstorm upsets familiar plans. Jaeron holds out hope, but doubt creeps in, and he begins to question whether his family still cares about him now that he’s older — intensifying what will become his most defining birthday yet.

title: Ben'Imana
overview: Rwanda, 2012. The country is emerging from an era of silence after the 1994 Tutsi genocide, and people's courts are being set up with the aim of bringing justice and reconciliation. Veneranda, a survivor, is convinced of the need for these trials. Despite pressures, she organises discussion sessions between victims and the families of the executioners. Therapy for some, an act of betrayal for others, these testimonial sessions revive and reveal the traumas that each of them try to overcome, in their own way. The wounds of Veneranda's past are exposed again when she learns of her daughter's unexpected pregnancy and the identity of the father. Veneranda has to face her own contradictions and the dark parts of her past.

title: O.I.C . Gadafi
overview: OIC Gaddafi is a Sinhala action drama based on a true story. The film follows a fearless police officer who stands up against corruption, injustice, and powerful political forces. As he fights to protect the law and ordinary people, he is drawn into dangerous conflicts that test his courage, loyalty, and sense of justice.

title: My Girlfriend Turned Into a Worm
overview: When his girlfriend inexplicably turns into a worm, Arthur builds her a miniature world in an attempt to process his grief.

title: Rosen und Reis
overview: In the middle of Maike's sister Inka's wedding preparations, the marital dispute between Sören and Maike is still simmering because she has been cheating. Maike suggests that Sören should have a fling himself so that peace can finally be restored. With whomever! But Sören ends up in bed with Maike's best friend Doris, of all people. Dirk, Doris' husband, is not the only one fuming with rage and wants to give Sören a thrashing. Maike in particular reproaches Sören: the offer was never meant to be like that! And in the midst of all the chaos, Inka decides to throw the stuffy wedding, which groom Nils only wants to go ahead with for the sake of his conservative mother Renate. So: no wedding and three break-ups?

title: Rains Over Babel
overview: In a retro-futuristic, tropical-punk twist on Dante’s Inferno, a group of misfits converges at Babel, a legendary dive bar that doubles as purgatory, where La Flaca—the city’s Grim Reaper—presides. Here, souls gamble years of their lives with her, daring to outwit Death Herself.

title: Yesterday the Eye Didn’t Sleep
overview: In a Bedouin village in the Bekaa Valley, everyone is looking for Gamra. She is an enigmatic young girl who was accused of burning the vehicle of the man she loved when he decided to marry someone else. Will this burning flame spread out to the entire village?

title: Jordi and Nil, endless conversation
overview: Jordi, a 78-year-old widower, lives with his parrot, Pitu, and the loneliness of grief. Everything changes when he begins interacting with an AI, which he calls Nil. Their daily conversations give meaning to his days and have resulted in fifteen books. A tender portrait of aging, loss, and new forms of friendship in a digital world.

title: Caterpillar
overview: Set in a run-down Wellington villa in 2003, CATERPILLAR follows three women living separate lives under one leaky roof. Sixteen-year-old Cassie is all bravado and vulnerability, drifting into risky territory as she searches for belonging. Her mother Maxine, 52, is a formidable single parent and filmmaker on the brink of a long-awaited breakthrough, finally offered a greenlight—if she can land a star. Holding everything together is Huia, Cassie’s grandmother, 80, whose life has been defined by quiet service to family and a private obsession with raising monarch caterpillars, dreaming of one day witnessing the legendary butterfly migration in Mexico.

title: Stardom All Star Grand Queendom 2026
overview: All Star Grand Queendom 2026 was a professional wrestling event promoted by World Wonder Ring Stardom. It was held on April 26, 2026 at Yokohama Arena in Yokohama, Kanagawa, Japan, and is the fourth event in the Grand Queendom chronology. In the main event, Saya Kamitami defended the World of Stardom Championship against Sayaka Kurara, who was forced to risk the future of Cosmic Angels in an attempt to topple the Phenix Queen.  Other featured matches included a Wonder of Stardom Championship match between champion Konami and 2026 Cinderella Tournament winner Hanan, 02line (AZM and Miyu Amasaki) challenging BMI2000 (Natsuko Tora and Ruaka) for the the Goddesses of Stardom Championship after a controversial prior defense in January, and Natsupoi and Maki Itoh in a kawaii-based grudge match. A retirement ceremony for long-time star Saki Kashima was also held.

title: Becoming
overview: Rosa and Samuel had lost their way in life and were homeless. Then Nydia, the leader of a group of people forgotten by society, took them in at a ruined place overlooking the sea. Samuel discovered a fetus, which Rosa adopted. However, the arrival of Marcos spread news of an impending doomsday, plunging the entire group into fear and superstition.

title: Das Gewicht der Welt
overview: Models, calculations, samples: the facts about climate change are on the table, but politicians refuse to acknowledge them. Faced with this dilemma, three scientists decide to leave the laboratory and become activists. Maria, Sebastian, and Nana use their knowledge to maintain integrity between emotion and reason.

title: Perilous Passage: Birth in America
overview: A look at the impact of an already very precarious maternal health state in the U.S. post-rescinding of Roe v. Wade, via the Supreme Court's Dobbs decision, reversing rights that women have been working so hard to fight for, and that will actually have a deep impact that we can't even see just yet in terms of the numbers of mortality and trauma as a result of those very draconian policies.

title: Everkeep
overview: A haunting and tender fable of innocence, wonder, and the passage of time, "Everkeep" follows Odette, a lonely girl who dwells in the vast, enchanted expanse of a castle garden. Wrapped in her own world, she clings to childhood magic, convinced she can remain in this place forever.

title: Pahaad
overview: The story about resilience of people living in the mountains of Nepal, navigating survival and hardship.

title: The Witness
overview: Student Chingiz buys a surveillance camera and installs it in the entrance of his apartment building. The quiet, orderly life he observes is suddenly disrupted by footage of a real crime. Step in and risk his own life, or remain a silent observer behind the door — Chingiz is faced with a difficult choice. Help arrives from an unexpected source: a stranger, a young woman who works at a call center.

title: I Accidentally Wrote a Book
overview: Nina loves to make up stories, she wants to become a writer. Though she has her creative talent from her filmmaker father, there’s just one problem: Her clumsy magician brother Junior is bored of her stories. And since her mother died early, it’s difficult for Nina when a new love comes into her dad’s life. With the guidance of a bohemian writer next door, Nina uses writing to process the loss of her mother and open her heart to a new family member and first love. And suddenly, Nina realizes, her life is becoming a novel!

title: Black Dove
overview: When a man leading a double life is murdered during a secret affair, a troubled detective investigating the case must navigate lies, jealousy, and betrayal to uncover the woman who framed the perfect crime.

title: Night Light
overview: Five days before the proclamation of Martial Law, the Colgante Bridge collapsed in Naga, forcing a father into a desperate search for his missing son.

title: Return from Tomorrow
overview: Randy Moore’s follow-up to the (in)famously filmed-in-secret Disney World fever-dream Escape from Tomorrow is an absurdist paranoid conspiracy thriller featuring the original cast in a completely new scenario. After the loss of his father, a middle-aged dad spirals into a Lynchian crisis of masculinity while on family vacation in Miami. As his inadequacies and unspoken desires drift him further away from his wife, he uncovers a mysterious plot involving his father, the gas company, cocaine, prostitution, and . . . Walt?

title: Running
overview: Massoud has spent all of his life running, trying to make something of himself. However, nothing seems to work out. No matter how hard he runs, life gives him nothing in return. After chasing things that lead nowhere, he finally finds what he is meant to do.

title: Dust to Malibu
overview: After turning his life around and following the death of his ex-wife, a father decides to make amends to the daughter he hasn't seen for almost eight years.

title: The Shed
overview: Víctor and Daniela, a young couple with a baby, are trapped in poverty. Víctor, trapped in a cycle of alcohol abuse, sees an easy, effortless solution in a mysterious pen shed that promises to fulfill his desires at no apparent cost: all he has to do is go inside, imagine his riches, and the next day they’ll be waiting right at his doorstep.

title: Juvenile Inspektor: The Shadow Over Jõhvi
overview: In Soviet-occupied Estonia, a boy is caught between a broken family, the suffocating grip of state power, and forces far older than the empire itself. As propaganda and betrayal close in, he discovers that the greatest danger emerges where political oppression and ancient myth converge - and that his own bloodline may hold the key to both survival and ruin.

title: The Lurking
overview: A creature lurks in the shadows of the night inside a girl's bedroom.

title: Reunion
overview: After five years in prison, a father reconnects with his daughter. During a tense meeting, he tries to impress her by attempting to repair their relationship. But she sees through his facade and refuses to be convinced, Coming with only one purpose, to find out who he really is. She confronts him and forces him to answer the questions that have been troubling her. He cannot give her a clear answer, but in the end, the truth comes to light.

title: Love and Gays
overview: A gay boy is placed in a dorm room with a girl to retrain him.

title: Void Supervisor
overview: Tasked with watching the void that occupies the back wall of a room with no doors, the Void Supervisor carries out his job to the letter. That is until something else decides to join him.

title: Odessa
overview: In the wake of WWII, a devoted father guides his fleeing family across the Dolomites. He is gentle with his son. And running for a reason.

title: GCW: One Night Only 2026 (Philadelphia)
overview: GCW returns to its heartland for a massive event in Philadelphia.  Streaming Live on TrillerTV+, witness the return of the King and a collision of pure power that will shake the foundations of Philly wrestling.  Philadelphia has always been the epicenter of extreme, and for One Night Only, GCW is bringing a card that honors that legacy while pushing the boundaries of modern independent wrestling.

title: Enough
overview: While researching a class assignment, Ashley, a disillusioned college student crosses paths with Erika, a quiet librarian, and is drawn into the decades-old fight for Japanese American redress and the story of a lawyer who must find the courage to testify in  order to help heal a community--and himself.

title: Spring Snow
overview: Between winter and spring, on a night that could go either way, two directors take to the streets with cameras and memories still in motion. Confession and rejection, love and its wreckage as fiction and reality bleed into one another, what they're truly waiting for may not be snow at all.

title: ROACH!
overview: Married Couple Arthur and Tori are preparing for a house visit as part of their adoption application, but chaos ensues when Arthur sees their chances threatened by an unwelcome guest - a creepy, crawly COCKROACH!

title: American Cheese
overview: Two moms fight over the last pack of American Cheese.

title: The Soviet Heist
overview: In 1977 Soviet Armenia, two brothers, Nikolay and Felix Kalachyan, pulled off the most daring bank heist in USSR history, stealing 1.5 million rubles from the State Bank in Yerevan using nothing but a children's umbrella. Swift and calculated, they couldn't escape the long arm of the Soviet state. The KGB closed in, the trial was secret, and the sentence was death. A true story buried for decades, until the Soviet Union itself ceased to exist.

title: We Believe You
overview: Today, Alice stands before a judge, knowing there is no room for error. She must speak up for her children, as her custody is being called into question. Can she protect them from their father before it is too late?

title: The Idiot
overview: The film IDIOT is a story of two completely different young men. Rene and Emil are brought together by their desire to get something from each other's world. As if without making any promises, they suddenly find themselves in situations where it seems that the only way out is to escape.  Emil, who seems to have been given everything in life, continues to disappoint his father and overcomes all the limits of suffering. Now he is faced with a life where he has to take responsibility for everything himself. He meets Rene, from whom Emil decides that he wants to learn a lot. Rene, however, tries to keep him away from mistakes that he can no longer fix himself, but he cannot remain confident enough.  Everything starts to develop too quickly and, despite Rene's warnings, Emil ends up turning the situation against both of them. They still have to work together to find a solution. Fear has overcome the boys.

title: Just One More
overview: A recovering addict, Jess, meets Charles, a dying man praying God will use him "just one more" time. As their lives collide, Jess battles shame, and doubt-discovering faith, forgiveness, and the hope to fight for a future beyond addiction.

title: Fragile
overview: A romance between two students develops as they navigate the frailty of life around them. But as tragedy comes to their doorstep, their love persists in an unexpected way.

title: Am I Funny Yet?
overview: A comedian confronts his own thoughts of suicide on stage, turning his personal crisis into an uncomfortable comedy.

title: Poppy Tears
overview: In 1920s New York, a female Jazz Singer desperate for the spotlight strikes a deal with a speakeasy owner but soon runs the risk of getting to deep into a dangerous, hallucinogenic world.

title: 77 Minutes
overview: Director Kim hasn't made a film in a decade. The lead of her first short appears as a spirit: "You stopped filming—and I aged." Betting her life savings on a 77-minute feature, she searches for a vanished actress. Reality and fantasy blur until the God of Film appears... "Why do I love you?"

title: Treasure of the Lost Reel
overview: An out of work, fantasy-prone film preservationist finds the only print of a sought-after animated film that a corporate assassin has been sent to destroy.

title: The Moonlight Murders
overview: An investigative reporter gets an exclusive interview with a key witness to the latest in a series of serial killings. Little does she know, her new interview suspect harbors a dangerous obsession.

title: Etty part 2
overview: At the age of 27, in Nazi-occupied Amsterdam, Etty Hillesum embarks on a spiritual and emotional journey, all chronicled in her diaries. In them, she unfolds her turbulent love affair with the psycho-chirologist Julius Spier, a relationship that becomes the catalyst for a radical inner transformation, accelerated by the growing threat she faces as a Jewish woman. Her unusual path ultimately leads her to an enormous act of solidarity.

title: I Have to Kill My Neighbor
overview: Lauren’s idyllic suburban life is shattered when her husband, Tom, is kidnapped. His anonymous captors give Lauren a strange ultimatum: she must kill Madeline - the next-door neighbor that Lauren despises.

title: Etty part 1
overview: At the age of 27, in Nazi-occupied Amsterdam, Etty Hillesum embarks on a spiritual and emotional journey, all chronicled in her diaries. In them, she unfolds her turbulent love affair with the psycho-chirologist Julius Spier, a relationship that becomes the catalyst for a radical inner transformation, accelerated by the growing threat she faces as a Jewish woman. Her unusual path ultimately leads her to an enormous act of solidarity.

title: Malati Mangale
overview: Malati and Mangales navigate love, sacrifice, and life's harsh realities, where emotions clash with responsibilities, revealing the fragile yet enduring bond that keeps them together through pain and change.

title: 2026 NCT WISH 1st CONCERT TOUR ‘INTO THE WISH : Our WISH’ ENCORE IN SEOUL in CINEMAS
overview: Get ready to witness even more upgraded performances, enriched production,  and the electrifying energy of the concert hall—all brought to life with vivid sound and a massive screen.  NCTzens are invited to be part of this unforgettable moment through two special screenings!

title: Hideko
overview: In 1970s Taiwan, a young Indigenous girl who sees herself as Momotaro rises to confront tattooed demons in order to secure her family’s future. Through her journey, the film reflects an era when Indigenous languages and identities were suppressed, revealing how genuine human connection transcends words.

title: The Nameless Season
overview: Do-wan grows increasingly anxious, afraid that he and Jae-yul, the boy he has secretly loved for years, will drift apart after graduation. After years apart, the two meet again by chance, and Do-wan realizes that the moment has come to finally confront his feelings.

title: Framing Her
overview: A young filmmaker travels across Asia to document independent women directors, but their stories bring her own past to the surface.

title: Homesickness
overview: An oil pastel 90-second animated documentary short explores international students’ homesickness through personal voices, abstract imagery, and reflective emotional journeys.

title: Six Months in a Pink and Blue Building
overview: Mexico City, early 90s. The day Bruno turns 11, his growing feelings for his best friend Vladimir clash with the sudden announcement that his father has HIV. Like in salsa songs, his family tries to sing and dance their pain away. Thirty years later, Bruno films and reimagine the memory of what he could not quite perceive as a child.

title: Cooper Berryman's The Navidson Record
overview: After the Death of His Father, Tom Navidson is Advised to Film His Day To Day Life. The Following Recordings Reveal the Mystery of the House and the Thing that Lives Beyond its Walls

title: Pratyabartan
overview: In the relentless race for status and success, Kolkata's famous surgeon Dr. Dipankar Sanyal and his wife Shalini lose touch with their roots—and their teenage daughter, Disha. Seeking solace in the digital world, Disha’s profound loneliness triggers an unimaginable crisis that turns high society against them.

title: El viaje de Liliana
overview: Lili gets off the bus to help an elderly woman, who in a casual conversation reveals a life full of abuse.

title: Veganzz
overview: The year is 1985. Thatcher has decimated Britain as a zombie virus runs rampant.  Alan struggles with the disappearance of his Dad, while Flynn struggles with his hunger for flesh. Both are tested when figures from there past try to break apart their friendship.

title: Gepellte Haut
overview: Four young people from Berlin decide to spend their summer in Portugal. They throw away their smart phones, open up their relationships and try to free themselves from any social norms. But just as their utopia comes true, a devastating forest fire breaks out around them.

title: Zombies Become Generals 2
overview: Late Qing era. Reporter Dai Xue uncovers a ring using zombies to traffic young girls. The mastermind is the Seventh Princess, a Ming descendant raising funds to restore her fallen dynasty. She turns General Habu into a zombie weapon. After the plot is exposed, she unleashes the vampire William. Habu regains his mind and fights back. At the critical moment, senior brother Shi Gandang arrives, and together they bring down the princess and William.

title: BIASes
overview: BIASes follows BIAS NYC, a party that uniquely fuses K-pop & underground club music while spotlighting queer & trans culture, as they prepare to make their debut in Seoul. Co-founders Sammy & Julian have poured everything into creating the inclusive community they've always yearned for, but will it embrace them back?

title: Alden & Elijah
overview: Two brothers, Alden and Elijah have one final weekend together before Alden moves away for work. When a snowstorm hits town, the two are trapped inside forced to reconnect.

title: Chasing Ghosts
overview: In a world where Hell’s tormented souls fuel civilization, a group of students experiences the dangers of dealing with the damned when their university assignment falls off the rails.

title: The Favor
overview: Struggling, a young man calls on a distant acquaintance for a favor that could change everything.

title: To the Moon and Back
overview: Two families from different social strata happen to be neighbors in a hotel in Sri Lanka. Adults are not very happy about this coincidence. But their twenty-year-old "children" fell in love with each other. In order to spend less time with annoying dads and moms, young people embark on their romantic journey through an exotic country, losing track of time. Fathers of families, concerned about this development, set off in search of their adult children, but suddenly they themselves are captured by the aborigines.

title: The Third Door
overview: A life coach is faced with a risky challenge when a friend proposes a plan to stage a fake session and steal a manuscript worth six million riyals from an old tycoon.

title: I See Buildings Fall Like Lightning
overview: Childhood friends Patrick, Shiv, Rian, Oli, and Conor played together, skipped school together, and dreamt of the lives they would have one day. Now they’re thirty, and the future they imagined is slipping quietly out of reach.

title: Sinatra! Eternity
overview: The movie Sinatra Eternity narrates the stormy relationship between Frank Sinatra and Ava Gardner. Two huge idols meet, get together, fall in love and chaos reigns.

title: Cha Gorom
overview: After completing her MBBS, Irin unexpectedly arrives at a remote, network-less tea estate in Sylhet, where healthcare depends mostly on paracetamol. Her friend Mithu, an aspiring artist and architecture student, joins her from Dhaka. There, they discover the harsh realities of tea workers’ lives and meet Nandini, a bright girl who dreams of becoming a doctor. Together, they help her chase that dream.

title: Family Guy: A Lesson In The Force
overview: A promotional animated short about Grogu and Stewie Griffin hanging out

title: Candy and the Pizza Ggirl
overview: Candy and the Pizza Ggirl is A Hindi Movie.  The story unfolds over one surreal, chaotic full-moon Saturday night in Mumbai, where a single small mistake or catastrophic incident triggers a chain reaction of interconnected, absurd, and unpredictable events. Multiple eccentric characters' lives collide in a fragmented, neon-lit world of illusion, bad decisions, excess, and blurring realities. No one is truly in control; everyone lives in their own version of reality, and chaos spirals as parallel paths overlap.

title: INCARNATUS
overview: Brian, a manosphere crazed incel reaches his breaking point

title: I Hate You Too
overview: A small argument between two girls snowballs into an all-out physical brawl.

title: What Comes From the Valley
overview: Five friends embark on a camping trip to Joshua Tree National Park. When they learn of a local urban legend known as the Yucca Man, their journey begins to take a sinister turn.

title: Reminiscencias
overview: Lucas, a 44-year-old priest, returns to San Juan to replace a deceased colleague. The return to her native province brings with it memories of the relationship he had with Mateo when they were teenagers. Mateo, now a 45-year-old psychologist, finds out that Lucas arrived in the province and decides to go see him.

title: Hitler's Big Fear: The Trial Against Degenerate Art
overview: In 1937, the Nazi regime launched its war on modernity, branding artists like Picasso, Chagall, Van Gogh, and Matisse as “degenerate”. Their works were banned, destroyed, or mocked in grotesque exhibitions, while Aryan ideals were glorified in state-sponsored shows. Framed by a major new exhibition at the Musée Picasso in Paris, the documentary revisits this ideological assault through rare footage, suppressed artworks, and the voices of curators and survivors. It broadens its scope to music, literature, and architecture, exposing how the Reich targeted all forms of dissenting expression. A timely meditation on repression, resistance, and the enduring fight for creative freedom.

title: The Poet And The Spy
overview: In 1919 Fiume, Russian spy Beatrice navigates political turmoil while protecting poet Gabriele D’Annunzio, entangling with an intelligence chief and a WWI deserter amid Italy’s revolutionary unrest.

title: Sudden Death
overview: Obsessive film professor Charlie is one long-take away from realizing his magnum opus film, SUDDEN DEATH. As problems spring up left and right, Charlie begins to put into question his legitmacy as a director and person.

title: Johnny Bronson
overview: A rage-bait streamer is reached out to by next-door neighbor, forcing him to confront his views on humanity. Also he's an alien from outer space sent to get humanity to destroy itself, so conflict is inevitable.

title: The Corner
overview: A short story about the life and work of Alexey Fishev (The Corner), the leader and inspiration behind one of Russia's most interesting underground bands, "Orgasm of Nostradamus." At first glance, he was an ordinary provincial punk, a heavy drinker who eventually became an alcoholic. But this is not just a chronicle of his downfall, but a portrait film about a man who found himself at the turning point of an era, when one world was already crumbling and another had not yet been built.

title: John Lennon: The Last Interview
overview: Untitled feature documentary centered on the final interview of John Lennon, directed by Steven Soderbergh.

title: LIVE matches from WWE World: April 19, 2026 Part 2
overview: A broadcast from WWE(World Wrestling Entertainment) of the Live Matches from WWE World it is the second of two broadcast of the same name on the same day.

title: Lacuna
overview: A man finds himself with an unknown neurological ailment.

title: The Heartbreak Kid: Becoming Shawn Michaels
overview: Follows the life and career of WWE performer Shawn Michaels, tracing his rise, personal struggles, and eventual comeback with an unfiltered look at his journey.

title: CMLL at Palms Slam Fest 2026
overview: Pearl Concert Theater at Palms Casino Resort transforms into a portal to Arena México. As a marquee event of Slam Fest week, Consejo Mundial de Lucha Libre (CMLL) presents a card where international legacies collide and championships are on the line.

title: Plot Twist
overview: Twins Mike and Jolie, have begun to drift apart as college comes closer. However, while cleaning out their closet, they get trapped in different movies from their childhood and must complete each plot to escape, learning lessons along the way and possibly rekindling the friendship they once had before it is too late.

title: Strawberries
overview: Hasna leaves her native Morocco to work as a seasonal laborer picking strawberries in Huelva, Andalucia.

title: The Wolf, the Fox, and the Leopard
overview: When a girl raised by wolves is found in the woods, she must learn to forge her own path as those around her try to exploit her for their own purposes.

title: Ay-Dee-Ah
overview: A hopeful girl bakes a cake with her best friend, realizing that the tender feeling she felt in the way he says her name was one-sided.

title: La Barrière
overview: Géraldine, a young film production assistant, blocks off a deserted road for a shoot near Calais. There's little traffic, except for Amar, a Syrian refugee. Burdened by her barrier and her walkie-talkie constantly blaring orders, Géraldine tries her best to complete her task under Amar's intrigued and amused gaze. This unexpected encounter will subtly intertwine the destinies of these two lonely souls.

title: Niñxs
overview: At the foot of Tepozteco, a sacred hill that governs the winds and fertility, lies the small town of Tepoztlán. Against this backdrop, fifteen-year-old Karla's body and mind are undergoing a revolution.

title: Peter Has Something to Say
overview: A young man has a conversation with his inner self

title: Seven Millimeter
overview: Two satellites passing through each other's orbit become lonely lumps of steel

title: Nail-Biter
overview: On the eve of her eighteenth birthday, anxious nail-biter Amy Heller confronts her overbearing mother about their so-called family curse, a finger-devouring creature that preys on those who bite their nails, just as the monster arrives to claim her as its next victim.  A gothic horror short and proof-of-concept for a feature film.

title: Tail
overview: One disturbed killer keeps a stolen boy, a fractured detective, and a quiet pianist orbiting each other inside the disorienting maze of his cryptic mind.

title: Alex
overview: Alex, a non-binary person, becomes pregnant and seeks an abortion with support from their aunt Salome, a traditional doctor.

title: Unraveling the Dream
overview: In The Doors of Perception (1954), Aldous Huxley wrote that the urge to transcend self-consciousness was "a principle appetite of the soul." He hoped that psychedelics would make the experience of self-transcendence more widely available, and thereby catalyze a transformation in the culture.  But experiencing ego dissolution is one thing; integrating it into ordinary life is another. And, as the misadventures of the 1960s attest, building a culture around self-transcendence is a perilous (if inspiring) endeavor.  “Unraveling the Dream,” a new film presented by the Waking Up meditation app, explores whether the new science of psychedelics might shed fresh light on Huxley’s vision. Featuring original interviews with Anil Seth, Robin Carhart-Harris, and Shamil Chandaria, the film takes viewers on a sweeping journey to the frontiers of neuroscience and through the rich, turbulent history of psychedelics.

title: A. Rimbaud
overview: Follows French writer Arthur Rimbaud from his schoolboy days in Charleville to his final years in Africa.

title: Ada: My Mother the Architect
overview: A deeply moving portrait of an architect tested by the impossible choices between career, country and motherhood

title: Something Casual
overview: Alex, a first-generation latino artist, and Frankie, a professional dancer, navigate the soulless casual hookup culture of Los Angeles. Dating apps and casual sex reign, as they both deny their feelings and continue seeing other people while they fall in love. A series of misunderstandings leaves these two star-crossed lovers oscillating between confusion (ghosting and ignoring) and obsession (sex and pasta). But what happens when they finally meet someone different? Do they even know how to love anymore?

title: The Crime of Cuenca
overview: Osa de la Vega, Cuenca, Spain, 1913. Gregorio and León, employees on the estate of the village's mayor, a powerful landowner, are arrested and accused of the murder of José María el Cepa, a shepherd who mysteriously disappeared three years earlier.

title: Ideal Candidate
overview: Ainsley Bruce attempts to get his life back on track in the form of a job interview. All seems well on the surface, However his demons from his past continue to haunt him.

title: Valley of the Shadow
overview: When a serial killer posing as a Reverend murders two families in 1877 Colorado, the survivors from each family join forces to track down the killer in an attempt to deal out their own version of Western justice.

title: Wasterville
overview: Set off by a traumatic breakup, Paul Fisher (Poissonnier) spirals into a vicious underworld of sex, drugs and violence. Broke and clamoring for his next fix, Paul is lured into the clutches of pornographic film producer Ralph Beavers (Himself), where he is betrothed to none other than his own ex-girlfriend! Can Paul escape the malevolent forces that hunger for the flesh of his soul? Find out the mind-melting conclusion in this phantasmagoric journey into the heart of the unknown. Welcome to WASTERVILLE.

title: DAWNLAND
overview: An apathetic museum archivist is tasked with returning a mythical artifact back to its resting place, deep in the forest.

title: Pass It Forward
overview: An automatically kind teen carrying the weight of a difficult life at home learns the quiet power of his kind words, and how that kindness sometimes comes back around.

title: MincedMeat
overview: A short film by Leo Stern about how Operation MinceMeat came to be and how the outcome was.

title: Breakfast: Accept the Reality
overview: Divorcing couple Rishab and Lakshmi meet counselor Dr. Gangadevi, who recounts a film about Shantanu and heiress Janvi — on hearing that story the couple finds about an estranged person and the get to know about the relationship between them.

title: Direct Action
overview: Direct Action documents the everyday of one of the most important activist communities in France in order to see how the success of a radical protest movement can offer a path through the climate crisis facing us all.

title: The Close
overview: Set on a seemingly quiet residential street where the neighbours are all just trying to get through the day without incident. But beneath the calm exterior, everyday life quickly unravels into the absurd, the awkward and the unexpectedly hilarious

title: That Night, Our Decaf
overview: The story of two students whose lives become intertwined after an unexpected late-night encounter over a cup of decaf, leading to a connection filled with secrets, tension, and unspoken feelings.

title: Milano infetta
overview: Using archival materials, *Milano Infetta* tells the story of *Il Virus*, a historic squatted space in 1980s Milan and the heart of the punk movement, amid urban transformations and the loss of memory.

title: Broken Rice
overview: An international student far away from home finding comfort in broken rice.

title: Young Blood
overview: Three elderly men come across a bottle of magical beer. After experiencing their 'what-could-have-beens' in their 20-year-old bodies, they soon realize that second chances aren't needed when the first was more than enough.

title: KLEPTO
overview: A tense encounter between a store security guard and a single mother reveals the high cost of desperation in a world that’s quick to judge.

title: Thala
overview: A group of children living in a slum in the capital city found a bloody human head in abandoned condition. It belonged to someone very dear to those children. The children decided to keep the head as a secret for a short period, To find the truth.

title: Pursuit of Perfection - The Indy 500 with Conor Daly
overview: Pursuit of Perfection follows Conor Daly during the weekend of the Indianapolis 500, the most coveted prize in American open-wheel racing. As engines fire and pressure builds, Daly navigates the highs, lows, and unpredictable moments, offering an intimate look at what life is like for a driver chasing victory at the Greatest Spectacle in Racing.  Conor Daly is a native of Noblesville, Indiana, and much of the film was shot in and around the Indianapolis Motor Speedway.

title: The Grand Amir and Donna Maria
overview: Maria suffers from the strangest illness; it resembles cancer but with one distinct difference: it somehow connects Maria to the fate of a 15th century woman named Donna Maria. Maria begins to time travel, gradually discovering the absolute brutality of history. She learns that Donna Maria was a Hungarian princess taken to a Bursa harem as a concubine of Ottoman's Sultan.

title: Don't Shoot The Messenger
overview: A pickup man and a small-time criminal both face a moral dilemma.

title: Lovebug
overview: Upon returning his wallet, Adalia is invited into Aphid's home. There would be coffee, conversation, and an abundance of bugs.

title: Faith & Forgiveness: A Duck Dynasty Love Story
overview: Lisa and Al Robertson, known from Duck Dynasty, fell hard and fast believing they had found a once-in-a-lifetime love. But betrayal and unspoken pain slowly fracture what they built together. When the truth comes to light, both must confront everything they thought they knew about love and loyalty — and decide if their marriage and faith are worth fighting for.

title: Hundertzwölf
overview: Who picks up when you dial 112? In Berlin, it’s the staff at the fire department’s massive emergency call center. Newcomers are finding their way or giving up, while veterans provide support from the background. Anything can happen at any moment. And then New Year’s Eve arrives.

title: Synthetic
overview: The film is based on real-life events. Alena, a voice-over star, suddenly discovers that her voice has been stolen by the developers a major bank's neural network. Now her voice can be heard everywhere—from airport announcements to entertainment and gaming platforms. Alena realizes that in the modern reality a person's voice does not fall under legal protection. Thus, not only voice-over actors but everyone is at risk. The actress starts a struggle for the right to her own voice.

title: Cochena
overview: A chant from another time reveals the ancient everyday gestures of a Gypsy family, anchored by the errant couple Maria and Arménio. In the flow of days and life cycles, we find resistance and celebration.

title: Prey of Wrath
overview: An elite special forces operative is sent by Russian Intelligence to hunt down former teammates who have hijacked nuclear warheads.

title: The Salinas Decoder
overview: It is August 8th, 1969 and a teacher from North Salinas High School, along with his wife solve one of the ciphers sent to San Francisco Chronicles by the Zodiac Killer, not realizing they turned him into a legend.

title: Sympathy
overview: A man tries to come to terms with a crime he committed

title: Frescoes
overview: When returning to a childhood home, traditions reveal themselves like a cyclical nightmare.

title: Gunju
overview: Thirteen-year-old Yerin, during the last summer of her childhood, finds herself longing to be scolded. She envies Gunju, the girl next door who is the same age as her, for one reason alone: the constant scolding Gunju receives is a clear manifestation of her family's attention. Desperate to confirm their families' affection, the two girls embark on a bold adventure.

title: Adieu monde cruel
overview: Fourteen-year-old Otto writes a suicide letter to his family and classmates, but his attempt fails. Too ashamed to go back home, he hides. As night falls, he roams the city streets like a ghost—until a girl from his high school, Léna, recognizes him.

title: Edinburgh 2026
overview: A short home movie documenting a road trip from Liverpool, England to Edinburgh, Scotland, up the M6 and through Hartside Pass - both ways.  A questionable decision, in hindsight.  Featuring questionable navigation, Tesco Clubcard economics, and a surprisingly capable small car.

title: Love: Synthesized
overview: A grieving widow undergoes a ritualistic experiment using an unproved method of time travel in an attempt to reunite with her late husband.

title: See the Person
overview: The first film made in Bangladesh about Cerebral Palsy.

title: Jokhom | জখম
overview: A powerful emotional drama where deep wounds of the heart force two people to confront love, pain, and the scars left behind.

title: JCW Strangle-Mania: Viva Las Violence 2026
overview: The "Wicked Clowns" are taking over the Strip for a night of pure, unadulterated violence. Juggalo Championship Wrestling presents Strangle-Mania: Viva Las Violence. Streaming Live and Exclisive on TrillerTV+, this event brings the legendary spirit of the Gathering to Las Vegas for a high-stakes, high-impact spectacle.

title: Something Pointless
overview: When an unhappy young boy discovers an older man quietly affixing painted eggshells to a disused wall in their neighbourhood, he begins to understand how even the smallest, strangest acts can leave behind something lasting.

title: Winter Hymns
overview: A palliative care doctor meets with a series of dying patients.

title: IScream
overview: An animated short about a team who will do anything it takes to win a challenge… including going through their freezer door into an alternate ice cream dimension.

title: Mr. Nothing
overview: Mr. Nothing is a bitter fairy tale about two young men who meet on an app: one loves unreservedly, while the other seduces and destroys, incapable of opening up. Caught between illusion and fear, he chooses the void over love.

title: Hollow Walker of the Lake
overview: A young hiker stalked by a sinister presence forms a brief romantic entanglement with another woman.

title: Bamse and the Secret of The Sea
overview: Bamse, Little Skutt and Skalman go out into open water and far down to the bottom of the sea. And Captain Buster is willing to do anything to earn the title of Terror of the Sea.

title: Let's Go Home
overview: Following the loss of his wife, a grieving young father withdraws from the world — until the quiet care of his four-year-old daughter begins to bring him back.

title: Bar Avni conducts Ravel, Milhaud, and Bizet With Ava Bahari
overview: We catch up with Bar Avni two years after her victory in the La Maestra conducting competition. At the Philharmonie de Paris, the conductor joins forces with the Orchestre de Paris and violinist Ava Bahari for a vibrant concert.

title: Suicide Tuesday
overview: Tove, a troubled young woman, is contemplating suicide when she meets Jesse, a carefree vagabond. She agrees to remain in his company on one condition: he must help her find heroin.

title: Movement Unbound
overview: Long before the term “diversity” was on everyone's mind, the DIN A 13 tanzcompany in Cologne, under the artistic direction of Gerda König, was developing mixed-abled performances with dancers with and without disabilities. To this day, their pieces remain political, provocative, and constantly searching for new forms of expression in contemporary dance.

title: Diwata
overview: With her twilight years on the horizon, a Filipina grandmother ditches her eightieth birthday party to summon the spirit of her long-dead granddaughter, navigating repressed memories as she attempts to make amends with her past.

title: Forgotten
overview: An elderly man living with dementia begins to lose his sense of time, place, and identity, while his son quietly stays by his side. Through small moments and fading memories, their relationship is tested in ways neither can fully understand.

title: Lupus
overview: In the middle of the night, a boy is startled by the sound of breaking glass and the presence of a creature in his home. With a lamp in hand, he ventures into the hallway to discover what lurks in the darkness.

title: Pucio
overview: Pucio and his family are exploring the world! Every day brings new adventures—making jam together, painting a family portrait, and even… a kayaking trip and camping in their own living room! When it’s bath time, Pucio and Bobo are joined by a cheerful toy crocodile who also desperately needs a bath! Pucio learns to share with others, make new friends, and cope with boredom on a rainy day. In every episode, Pucio proves that imagination and creativity can turn the most ordinary moments into something truly special!

title: Squatters' Rights
overview: The relationship between a Frog and a Lumberjack intensifies as they argue over who has the rights to the river.

title: Mantra Muugdha
overview: A magical, musical, maddening ride where the music will unleash a thrilling adventure of a lifetime.

title: Someone Else's Call
overview: Present day. Artist Natasha is preparing for an exhibition of her paintings. At the gallery, before the opening, she recognizes one of the employees as her former classmate and first love, the musician Igor, and she plunges into memories. The beginning of the 2000s. Young Natasha is torn between the pressure of her rational parents, determined to send their daughter to study law, and her dreams of entering the Academy of Arts in St. Petersburg. A new classmate, the talented musician Igor, helps her believe in herself and take a risk. The young people fall in love with each other, but their happiness is interrupted by a family tragedy. Natasha, not ready to sacrifice her dream for Igor, leaves for St. Petersburg and begins to build her life. The choice made in youth often turns out to be decisive. And the adult Natasha wonders what she should have done if she had the opportunity to turn back time.

title: Blood Orange
overview: A young teenage romance full of love and erotic desire slowly unravels into a  stylistic thrilling tale of obsession

title: The Bible. So What?
overview: The Bible. So What? aims to provoke and address the kinds of questions a spectator might have about the Bible, which, although frequently overlooked, has shaped the moral, legal and cultural foundation of the Western world for the past 1,600 years.  I aim to challenge the postmodern relativist impulse to find new meanings as I try to reorient the spectator towards the ‘grand narrative’ of the Bible. By reading it themselves, viewers may discover a deeper sense of meaning, purpose, personal significance, direction and ultimate truth in the Christian gospel, a personally meaningful metanarrative grounded in history, tradition and revelation.  Although I present a single perspective due to the time constraints of my brief, the counterargument to my film is already present, as misrepresentations of the Christian faith frequently obscure and corrupt public impressions of the Bible. Therefore, I want to draw the focus back to the Bible, what it says, and show that it is worth reading.

title: Humid
overview: Over a monsoon-soaked day in a crumbling Mumbai building, a young masseuse moves quietly from body to body. Her caring touch soothes the pain of an ailing, bedridden woman, and the anxiety of a new mother, exhausted by duty and desire. As care slips toward intimacy, her hands become a conduit through which life, death, and desire pass without resolution.

title: Emergency Exit
overview: Aria and Noah are on the DC metro when it breaks down due to strange events outside. Aria pretends to call for help, and they wait, until Noah figures out the lie

title: Scherbenland
overview: Spanning 50 years, the documentary traces a path through the Berlin district of Kreuzberg, linking the legacy of the rock band "Ton Steine Scherben" - best known for their work in the 1970s - with their successors.

title: We, the Inheritors
overview: My parents want us to inherit their life's work. We must talk. About expectations and ideals. About privileges and burdens. But also, about money.

title: Rx
overview: A slacker taking care of his ailing grandfather finds himself in over his head when he invites his best friend over to get high.

title: Mountain King
overview: When Hannah travels to Sweden to surprise her boyfriend and meet his parents, she begins to suspect that his family is hiding a monstrous secret.

title: Homecoming
overview: The story of a boy who, after being forced to leave Ukraine due to the Russian invasion, returns home to Zaporizhzhia through his mechanical avatar — a robotic dog he controls from his room in Poland.

title: The Snake Catcher's Tale
overview: In the misty mountains, a snake catcher finds himself trapped in a double nightmare — brutal government tyranny and a plague of deadly serpents

title: Shreklife
overview: Five childhood friends reunite for the first time after the death of their classmate Pedro, an unconditional Shrek fan. They are entrusted with an important mission: to honor the memory of the deceased by scattering his ashes at Shrekfest, a festival in honor of the green ogre and taking place in Wisconsin, USA.

title: Front Row
overview: Up bright and early with their pet in tow, Zohra Bouderbala and her five children are heading to the beach. This is not a drill! In Algiers, the coveted front row spot waits for no one, but it’s not this family’s first time having to beat the summer seaside crowds. The unmotivated and out-of-luck masses who arrive too late will be left to a viewless laze in the sun, the alleged horizon blocked by a fortress of parasols and flowing canopies.

title: Criminals
overview: June, 1944, German-occupied Denmark. It has never been so dangerous to be part of the resistance. In a safe house, five fighters wait for comrades on a sabotage mission. When they do not return, and no news comes, fear begins to take hold.

title: Trauma, or Monsters All
overview: An aspiring author gets more than she bargained for when she writes an article for the local paper about her small town’s dark history, prompting unwanted speculation on what monsters may lie within.

title: Time Keeps Marching On
overview: An undocumented immigrant explores his and his family's immigration trauma while grasping hope through a voicemail.

title: Cinquillo -1
overview: Five mobsters, minus one who didn't show up, are tasked with retrieving a mysterious briefcase. What seemed like a simple job takes a turn for the worse on a fateful day for them all, except for the one who didn't come.

title: Take Me to Your Merch
overview: An "elder emo" band struggles to get back together until they meet some intergalactic super fans with an apocalyptic ultimatum.

title: SUCCESSOR
overview: A soon to be elected CEO of a plastic manufacturer can't shake the feeling he is being watched.

title: HOG: Las Vegas Culture Clash 2026
overview: Watch House of Glory: Culture Clash live on TrillerTV and experience the high-octane ‘Lucha-Resu' style that has made HOG a global phenomenon. Featuring top wrestling stars, elite technical matchups, and world-class high-flyers, this event delivers a must-see main event and championship action. Streaming live from the Palms Casino Resort in Las Vegas, Culture Clash brings together iconic talent and the most prestigious titles in professional wrestling.

title: Love on a Tightrope
overview: In 1960s Spain, legendary trapecist Pinito del Oro hires young poet Natalia Sosa Ayala to help with her memoirs, sparking a profound emotional bond between them. Through historical events, intimate encounters, and decades of letters, their admiration, affection, and creative passion intertwine. The story moves between memory, desire, and imagination, showing how these two artists influence each other’s quests for freedom, artistic expression, and recognition. Rooted in real moments but told with a dreamlike, imaginative lens, it explores what might have been between them, revealing a tender, evocative tale of connection, longing, and the courage to defy societal constraints.

title: Mothers Are Mothering
overview: Nia, 50, in an abusive marriage navigates a fragmented inner world where desire, memory, and ritual intertwine. A reunion with a former lover reawakens intimacy but exposes the persistence of violence and entrapment. As reality dissolves into hallucination, she reaches for a final, elusive escape.

title: Jerry the Ginger Eater
overview: A man who eats red-headed women befriends a sex worker in hopes to eat her red-headed lady pimp.

title: Buried Under Years of Dust
overview: Emily Grodin is an autistic woman who spoke minimally for a significant part of her life, until she had a breakthrough and began to express herself in new ways.

title: The Planet
overview: August 1960. Director Nikolai Berentsev is working on a large-scale science fiction film about an expedition to Venus. The construction of grandiose decorations begins in the pavilion. Berentsev himself develops models of planets and spacecraft, comes up with special devices for combined filming. He tries to imagine and visualize something that no one has ever seen — life on other planets. He believes that fantasy should run ahead of science, but faces skepticism from colleagues and the scientific community. In the end, he himself begins to doubt whether his film is needed by the audience, why these dreams of Space, when there are so many unresolved problems on Earth.

title: A State Film
overview: Through rare archive footage, the documentary traces the forty years of Enver Hoxha's communist regime in Albania, revealing cinema as a weapon of power.

title: Bride or Die
overview: A bachelorette getaway turns into a living nightmare when a man breaks in and tries to kill bride-to-be Allie. Now trapped with a murderer in the house, the friends get put to the test as they find themselves in a deadly fight for survival.

title: Message from President Trump (Archived) March 10th, 2032. Uncut 720p version.
overview: Our President has some words of wisdom to drop on our little asses.

title: Young Adults
overview: A struggling couple in a Shenzhen urban village find hope in a friend's investment fantasy — until job loss and deception shatter their fragile relationship.

title: Double Shift Dad
overview: Forced to work a double shift on his daughter's birthday, a night watchman throws a secret party at his job. But what begins as a heartfelt gesture soon spirals out of control, putting his job and his relationship with her at risk.

title: When I Get Home
overview: When the adventurous knight Grace, who has never experienced an ounce of fear in her many dragon fights, suddenly gets teleported to the real world. She now has to deal with things that she has never even seen or heard of before?! On the journey she comes to find connection in small town barista Clair, who herself longs for excitement and someone to come save her from her daily live. Can Grace find her way home and what will happen to her new friend?

title: El Último Turf
overview: Three retirees who spend their days unsuccessfully betting on horse racing, after losing a large sum of money, decide to solve their problems by planning an absurd heist, convinced they are doing justice and will fix their financial woes. The loot: a coveted golden horse.

title: Double Freedom
overview: Misael works alone with his axe, cutting down trees in the woods. An unexpected responsibility upends his life, and the logic of his days fades away in a nature where human reason holds no meaning.

title: Dead Serious
overview: Two teens decide to help the other face their phobia, and their first instinct is to visit an abandoned house. When the duo’s mission goes awry, they find that some things are better left undisturbed.

title: The Sleepover: The reckoning Of Sidney Rotherham
overview: Sidney Rotheraham wasn't invited to the sleepover, and he wants revenge...

title: (Not That You'd Answer, but) Are You Ok?
overview: Four college friends navigate a shift in their group dynamic through a night of partying a week after one of them attempted suicide.

title: The Decision
overview: 4 Friends decide what movie to watch

title: Lumps
overview: When Lu, a high functioning albeit highly anxious young woman, diagnoses herself with a terminal illness, she spends her last days on earth ruining her life.

title: Frontal Lobectomy
overview: A man gets his empathy surgically removed, in order to pursue a corporate career.

title: Spiralbound
overview: Tom, an ordinary guy, finds himself in a seemingly never-ending nightmare, forced to play many roles in many different fictional films—a spiral he must escape, or The Filmmaker will keep him trapped within it.

title: iris?
