overview: An obsessed director, filming a modern adaptation of "Carmen," falls in love with the lead actress and gradually blurs the line between cinema and reality, turning the set into an arena of jealousy and self-destruction.

title: PASTIS
overview: Sasha, 20, returns to her family’s sun-soaked home in the south of France with her friends—her first visit since her older sister’s death. What begins as an idyllic summer escape slowly curdles into something far more suffocating.

title: 13 Souls
overview: Following her mother’s death, fifteen-year-old Agne moves in with her estranged father and older sister near a cemetery where he works. There, she uncovers a mysterious and deadly connection between her family and the “13 Souls” — victims of a tragic, unsolved fire decades earlier. As the past resurfaces and strange phenomena escalate, Agne finds herself entangled in a supernatural mystery tied to possession, reincarnation, and long-buried guilt.

title: Top Hat - The Musical
overview: Based on the classic 1935 RKO movie starring Fred Astaire and Ginger Rogers, Top Hat is a sparkling romantic cocktail laced with witty comedy, stunning choreography and tap-dancing brilliance, brought to life on stage with lavish sets and gorgeous costumes. Irving Berlin’s irresistible score includes some of Hollywood’s greatest songs, including the immortal Cheek to Cheek, Let’s Face the Music and Dance, Top Hat White Tie and Tails and Puttin’ on the Ritz.  When Broadway star Jerry Travers arrives in London to open a new show, he crosses paths with model Dale Tremont whose beauty sleep is rudely interrupted by Jerry tap dancing in the hotel suite above hers. Instantly smitten, Jerry vows to abandon his bachelor life to win her – but the path of true love never does run smooth.  Put on your top hat, brush off your tails and let this joyous romantic musical comedy sweep you off your feet!

title: Nasty
overview: After their violent breakup, the ghost of her ex follows her. He is everywhere, wherever she looks, so Alex seeks refuge. She soon discovers that all her familiar places and faces are a threat. Her instincts lead her to an underground walkway. There, she connects with a homeless man who lives there. In his gaze, she recognizes a shared trauma. She feels like he is the only person, in the only place where they can coexist. Their silent companionship brings her one step closer to facing her trauma head-on for the first time.

title: ALLOY OF FEAR
overview: Rafael, filled with anxiety, heads to a secluded spot in the forest, where he encounters a group of masked men. There, he hands over the murder weapon and Amalia's braid as evidence. In exchange, the leader, a man in a clown mask, gives him a suitcase of drugs and a new gun—a mission Rafael cannot bear to undertake. When he refuses, the clown threatens him that if he does not obey, his family will pay the price. The mental burden becomes unbearable. Later, the masked men discuss the events of the day, unaware that Rafael, unable to bear it any longer, has ended his life.

title: Devil Box
overview: Kev, a dim-witted office worker, tries to win his father’s favour and save the world after his new mom, Bela, lets him in on a conspiracy involving his younger brother, Kody, and his plans to take over their family business.

title: Étouffée
overview: After a grueling exam, seventeen-year-old Élynne heads home with her siblings. Trapped in the backseat, she becomes the target of her sister's relentless words, until silence is all that's left.

title: അവിചാരിതം
overview: In 2046, Britto was digging in his land when he discovered something that soon became news.

title: Haunted Harmony Mysteries: Key to the Castle
overview: When a ghost hunter show comes to town, it's up to Gethsemane and Eamon to solve the unexpected murder of the host, allowing the brand-new spirit to cross-over.

title: The Last Light
overview: In a world bound by prophecy, the rise of the Dark Lord threatens to plunge everything into eternal darkness. As supernatural forces awaken, three unlikely heroes—Black Hawk, a reluctant warrior tied to a powerful spirit, Kookoo Monkey, a chaotic fighter, and the coward Vesante Elevante—are drawn together as the last hope against an unstoppable fate. But the prophecy is clear: they are destined to fail. Hunted by deadly enemies and facing powers beyond their control, they must fight to survive a war that may already be lost. Blending action, horror, and chaotic humor, The Last Light begins a story where destiny itself is the greatest enemy.

title: Chum
overview: A newlywed couple joins friends on a Mediterranean yacht excursion, only to find themselves caught between a predatory shark and a psychopathic killer in their midst-transforming a sun-drenched escape into a fight for survival.

title: Mr. Monster
overview: In the Hive, love blooms amidst a brutal struggle for survival. Ian and Lily face Monsters and perils to escape, with their fate intertwined with a sacrifice that challenges the depths of their love and haunts their journey forever.

title: Kairos
overview: Short film documenting the last 10 days of the senior year.

title: Eventually
overview: A struggling but capable teenager works through his increasingly odd responsibilities on a family farm.

title: Portrait In Red
overview: A mysterious guest arrives at a dinner party during a pivotal moment in an artist's career.

title: Bird Rhapsody
overview: Film selected for the Cannes Film Festival La Cinéf competition lineup.

title: Meet Me at the End
overview: A teenage girl comes to a crossroads when she's manipulated into feeling that she must choose between her sexuality and her faith.

title: The Black Salt
overview: The salt deserts of the Argentine Andes are being disrupted by profound changes that impact the environment, entire communities, and individual lives. As corporations extract lithium from the soil, two young political leaders, activist Vanesa and miner Elbio, run for president in their respective indigenous communities. In Buenos Aires, teenager Milagros protests outside the parliament as it holds uncertain national elections.

title: Operation Red Leppard
overview: Canadian military organization, M.U.D., enlists their most skilled operative for a highly dangerous mission.

title: Three's a Company
overview: Nava, Miki, and Ilan live together while running Tmuna Theater. The film portrays an alternative family that built an alternative theater, navigating between institutional recognition and an ongoing struggle for survival.

title: Mitjyu
overview: A story about two guy bonded with the relationship 'Mitjyu' yet navigating through the complexities with each other.

title: SUFFICIENT SIDE EFFECTS The Making Of Magenta House
overview: SUFFICIENT SIDE EFFECTS is the definitive behind the scenes look at the making of Magenta House using extensive behind the scenes footage shot during the production of the film and interviews with most of the crew and some of the cast. It’s a unique opportunity to showcase the creation of fully independent student film which we had full control over. The good, the bad and the ugly side of film making is on full display going through all the ups and downs of such a production and hearing from those who created it both pre and post filming and right up to the film’s premiere at the Horror On Sea Film Festival.

title: Me, You and the Cow
overview: Martina, addicted to her phone, is taken by her father to a rehab center with an unusual therapy: healing through bonding with cows. Far from Wi-Fi and close to what hurts, she will have to face what she’s been avoiding.

title: No More Heroes
overview: Léa is an old punk, Rémi an old hippie, Tonton a former fairground worker, Kiki a pink-haired Ma' Daltone, and Galak, their poodle. They all live together amidst laughter, drugs and rough love, dividing their time between a cramped Parisian council flat and a chalet in the Alps that’s far too big for them. One day, Kiki has a stroke, plunging her into dependency and forcing her daughter to take charge of her, even though she struggles to look after herself. No More Heroes tells the story of a tribe trying to hold its own in the world.

title: Voyage of The Lost
overview: After a cosmic storm wiped out nearly the entire universe, Vera Moon must fight to survive as she steals a map that leads to the one place she thought she'd never see again - Earth.

title: Something You Should Know About Me
overview: In this sweet and raunchy trans rom-com, insecure cartoonist Al is faced with his most daunting prompt yet: confess his true feelings for his best friend or risk losing him to a handsome nemesis.

title: To dream it first
overview: Mikkel and Mathilde are complete opposites, and share nothing except math class on Fridays. But when Mathilde dreams, she encounters a whole new side of Mikkel - who turns out to be dreaming the same dream. Can this meeting change everything?

title: PARANOIA
overview: In a series of recent home invasions, a teenage girl must fight her delusive suspicions when she is left home alone.

title: Micronations
overview: Sovereignty, borders, and community. Passports, constitutions, and anthems. All these topics swirl together in this feature film exploration of micronations. You might just be ready to start your own country by the end of it.

title: D’un monde à l’autre
overview: From One World to Another is an intimate documentary, a human and sensory journey through grief and friendship. After the accidental death of his best friend, actor Jérémie Renier begins a journey of contemplation thanks to the encounter with a French explorer, Loury Lag, who travels through uninhabited territories in extreme conditions. They will set off together across the Arctic ice floes. Left to their own devices, the two men will test each other, until they become alive again. An initiatory quest, which explores the territories of life, where the hostility of the world refers to death.

title: Rock Paper Scissors Death
overview: A man stuck in a deadly Rock Paper Scissors game wants to lose and escape. But with a hidden psychopath controlling the game, can he outsmart them or is he trapped forever?

title: FEAR OF THE other
overview: Eva, an architecture student sensitive to different people, is confronted with racism, indifference and cynicism, but also with her own psychological problems.

title: Mood Swings
overview: A coming of age drama about three different teen characters struggling to get by in their home town.  The first named Matthew is kicked out of his house and forced to find a job to support himself, the second named Noah is a hot shot basketball player who suffers an injury and can’t fulfill his scholarship to play on the college team, and the third named Eric is a party animal type who’s bad habits are leading him down a dark path that he may never get out of.

title: Delivery
overview: J (23), an agent who wishes to return to a normal life, is assigned one final mission by his superior: to go undercover as an illegal courier. He sneaks into the environment to take down the drug dealers. At first, J enjoys his work. However, as time goes on, he carries out his duties reluctantly. He tries to quit his job, but doubts always linger in his mind. All that pressure left J unsure of what to do, and it was his own choices that trapped him in a dangerous cycle. There was one final mission for J and it truly became his last, because everything changed when his identity was exposed during that final mission.

title: Retrieval
overview: If science allowed you to hold onto a piece of someone you lost, would you? When Christina’s fiancé dies suddenly, she faces the unexpected decision of whether or not to carry on his legacy via postmortem sperm retrieval.

title: The Murder of Rachel Nickell
overview: A young mother is killed in broad daylight on London's Wimbledon Common — in front of her toddler. This documentary examines the yearslong murder case.

title: Hiatus
overview: Lukas embarks a journey of acceptance and reprisal of art after Marianne leaves.

title: She Won't Bite
overview: When she is bitten by a vampire, Gabriella resolves to put a stop to his wrongdoings.

title: Duchy
overview: During an all-night train trip, Jasmine shares a compartment with Andrew - a mysterious, older man. At first a conservative and reserved acquaintance evolves into a tender, empathetic and understanding relationship between two alien souls.

title: Rodeo Dreams
overview: Six young Australian bull-riders travel to North West Queensland to compete for a spot in the Mount Isa Mines Rodeo; the largest and richest rodeo in the southern hemisphere.

title: EESHAN - THE PROTECTOR
overview: An upcoming Indian feature film currently in development.  The project approaches myth and futurism with restraint, exploring responsibility, balance, and human choice without spectacle or exposition.

title: Monkey Boy
overview: Frank is a successful comic book author who is struggling to reinvent himself. His series is no longer selling, and his publisher is pushing him to move on. But Frank lives with Monkey Boy, the main character from his series, and he doesn’t know how to let him go.

title: Kids Like Me
overview: Explores the life and aspirations of Oliver, a rambunctious and imaginative preteen growing up with disabilities, who’s an avowed murder-mystery aficionado about to craft the perfect mystery caper.

title: Josh Johnson: Symphony
overview: In his first HBO comedy special, comedian Josh Johnson debuts original material about our shared experiences as humans – tackling topics like family, religion, and relationships through his unique point of view and signature creativity.

title: The Road That Jack Hit
overview: An experimental, plotless look into the driving of a man named Jack.

title: The Festival Run
overview: When James is looking to submit his new short film to a festival, chaos ensues when he realises he submitted the wrong film.

title: Match point
overview: A timid journalist's life spirals out of control when a routine interview with a competitive ping-pong team turns into a ruthless obsession with winning at all costs. As he rises through the ranks of the club, he alienates everyone around him, proving that in this game, the biggest losses happen off the table.

title: Goodbye, My Loved Ones!
overview: A bride-to-be’s careless remark sparks chaos between two families, putting her wedding in jeopardy.

title: Summer Windows
overview: When an ambitious teenager has different plans for her future then originally planned with her friend, she sets up a backyard concert in an attempt to get everyone together for one last time. She must decide if she will allow personal and technical issues get in the way of creating a memorable night

title: i don't need a job
overview: A man ventures deeper and deeper into insanity due to the cost of AI and modern day internet culture.

title: What did you do to him?
overview: Life in a shelter for abused women is a daily challenge of adjustment and rediscovery of identity. In this documentary, I focus on the life of a woman who found herself in such a situation, trying to break free from the cycle of violence and regain her hope and self-esteem. The film highlights her unique journey, capturing the strength of mutual support and solidarity that she experiences within the shelter, as well as the difficulties she faces in her effort to adapt to her new reality.

title: Phantasmagoria
overview: Leo tries to come to terms with having lost his best friend Olivia. Through his stream of consciousness, memories become unearthed and a shadow of her haunts him.

title: Stand Up
overview: Vera is a fun-loving 23-year-old until her entire life is upended after an accident leaves her in a wheelchair. Struggling to cope with her new reality, she meets Xander, who helps to show her that being in a wheelchair doesn’t mean she’s stuck.

title: Notes from the Underground
overview: A cross-generational oral history of Cape Town, told through the underground hip-hop scene that turned rhythm, resistance and mentorship into a living education system.

title: Abjad
overview: experimental documentary

title: A Man Worth Killing
overview: After a series of brutal murders, and orders from The Big Boss, two callous and cold killers continue their bloodshed, only wanting to eliminate a weak old man, who is actually their biggest obstacle, but also a great threat to their unscrupulous plan.

title: Eveything Goes PUNK
overview: Maro and Lenio, also known as Vagina Kills, are a punk rock band looking for a bassist. They need to record their long-awaited album, but financial problems haunt them. The girls find themselves entangled with dark figures in Thessaloniki, leading them to an unexpected meeting.

title: The Joyless Economy
overview: Short film selected for the Cannes Film Festival Directors’ Fortnight Lineup. A documentary that explores how a woman's movie collection triggers her infidelity. Created for one viewer—the woman whose confessions are revealed through hypnotic second-person narration. All events and artifacts are presented at a steady, soothing pace.

title: The Ashes of Love
overview: Two wounded souls meet in Hiroshima, a city that remembers everything, and together they confront the love and pain they've tried to forget.

title: TikTok Never Dies
overview: When TikTok faces a nationwide ban, three influencers fight for their livelihoods, their voices, and the First Amendment. As their efforts advance to the Supreme Court, questions swirl around the stakes, power, and control of the future of social media.

title: In the summer house...
overview: A young man starting a career as a singer comes to the summer house to confess his feelings to his beloved, but their feelings are opposed by the girl's parents, and a rich young man from Moscow appears on his way.

title: Act One
overview: A young aspiring actress, desperate for guidance and belonging, falls under the spell of a manipulative acting coach who draws her into a web of control and obsession.

title: Kids See Ghosts
overview: One night, Jayden, a young boy, listens to his grandmother tell a poetic story about the innocence of children and the ghosts that arise within them due to the actions of adults.  Through four stories, the film illustrates how these traumas emerge and leave lasting marks across generations.

title: This Body of Mine
overview: United by an unbreakable friendship, Rafael and Carolina embark on an emotional and geographical journey in search of reconciliation and acceptance. Along the way, we follow Rafael through the first years of his gender transition: an intimate process filled with challenges, discoveries, and small victories that bring him closer to the square meter of peace he so deeply longs for. A luminous story in which friendship becomes a refuge and the personal expands until it feels universal. Amid remote landscapes and shared moments of vulnerability, the film reveals the beauty — and also the harshness — of inhabiting a body in transformation in a world that is only just beginning to learn how to see.

title: Sous le Soleil du Kwat (Under the Borough Sun)
overview: A portrait of love caught at the edge of sacrifice and new horizons, Sous le Soleil du Kwat (Under the Borough Sun) lets a tender love story unfold in the vibrance of Cameroon’s streets—until a revelation threatens to change everything.

title: Early Morning
overview: Plot under wraps.

title: Return of the Jungle
overview: Nine year old Mihir and his friends are faced with the daunting task of outwitting the biggest, meanest bully in school, Rahul Malhotra. To help them ride through this impossible journey, they turn to Thatha and his fantastic tales of inspiration from the ancient Jungles of India. Together, they must build a ruthless dinosaur, fight a nerve- racking game of cricket and travel all the way to Rajasthan, to rediscover the power of friendship, compassion and determination.

title: Calling You
overview: After a middle-aged father falls mysteriously into a coma that transports him to an idealised version of his past, his daughter must do all things necessary to rescue him from an eternal trap.

title: Cardigan
overview: A couple consider buying a second home in Cardigan, only to discover the town has strange rules about knitwear.

title: Что ты пела пока я спала
overview: Touching the past through the pre-revolutionary archive of my great-grandmother, a contemporary of the 20th century. My hands grope into the dark, viscous depths of time. The abyss resonates, and a foreign present resounds within me. Our voices merge, and a song emerges from oblivion.

title: Rendezvous at the Abandoned Zoo
overview: Feelings from the past are uncaged when exes run into each other at their old spot, new dates in arm.

title: Neutral Ground
overview: Stéphane and Mehdi use their personal histories as the basis from which to question this concept and its history up to the UN Security Council. But in our world of increasingly polarising conflicts, is there trully any other option that to take sides?

title: Eri, The Cow
overview: One spring, Eri, a Holstein cow, falls in love with Sawa, a Jersey newcomer. Eri idolizes Sawa and longs to be close to her, to become one with her. To refine her intense feelings for Sawa, Eri subjects herself to ascetic practices and rituals of her own making. In a world where those who do not bear children are disposed of, Eri has fallen for someone who shares the same fate.

title: Searching for Haifa – The Story of Shimon Holy
overview: Shimon Holy, a brilliant, one of a kind guitar hero from Haifa, was once a major promise in the city's music and cultural scene of the 1970s. One night in 1980, he meets the world's greatest guitarist for a spellbinding jam session that changes his life. Then he disappears. What remains is a local legend and a rare recording that suggests it all really happened.

title: Bird Flu
overview: An anxiety-ridden man’s decision to take in an injured bird leads to a deep reflection of his traumatic past and an intense physical transformation.

title: The Tropic Sun and His Eyes
overview: Traveling on foot, a young man returns to Haiti to reconnect with his estranged father. When a persistent street kid won’t stop following him, Ruben makes a deal: help him find a shortcut, keep some distance, and the boy can stay.

title: Silent Descent
overview: 2011, Broken Anthem is a punk band in decline. Between internal tensions, personal struggles, and an increasingly intrusive fanbase, they don’t suspect a thing, but their end is closer than they think.

title: Lou's Team: The Story of the Humboldt Crabs
overview: Nestled in the redwood forest of Northern California, the Humboldt Crabs, founded in 1945, are the oldest continuously operated summer collegiate baseball team, with their own band, ardent fans, and tradition of winning.

title: The Pledge
overview: Giving a pledge to the victim to find the killer, the police officer uses the girl as bait to search for someone who may never appear.

title: Sunday’s Children
overview: Desperate to become a father, a man spends a weekend falling for a woman who believes God has warned her never to have children.

title: Sheep
overview: Danny nervously starts a new job, unaware of the dark machinations that seem to be unfolding behind the scenes at the company. He must make a choice: endure the growing pressure of this increasingly oppressive environment, or flee…

title: Recluse
overview: Joan is a solitary audio engineer who returns to her family’s decaying country estate after receiving a call from her ailing father, an acclaimed but reclusive artist rumored to have dabbled in the occult. Unearthing a malevolent secret decades in the making, Joan must determine whether the horrors she faces are the product of her father’s misdeeds or her own troubled mind.

title: Ergolavos
overview: Thanasis is a sixty-year-old confectioner and owner of one of the oldest confectioneries in Thessaloniki. The film builds a portrait of a man who worries daily about his future in the possibility of his upcoming retirement and the redefinition of himself without the status of an employee.

title: Spoken
overview: A career built, challenged, and unraveled in public - told only through what was said at the time.

title: The Haunting of Pennhurst
overview: Once a notorious institution for people with disabilities, Pennhurst finally closed after decades of abuse in 1987. Now those doors are reopening, as a group of disabled performers reframe the narrative around the site's harmful history – as a haunted house.

title: It Happened
overview: Incapable of facing the loss of Pedro, Lucas and Mari dive in past memories. Remembering of happy moments, they discover that pain can, in the end, also mean longing.

title: A Message
overview: A Message is a short-form documentary draft capturing the raw, unmediated protests and performances of queer Palestinian artist Mama Ganuush while facing pink washing propaganda. Created by trans Palestinian artist Mama Ganuush, this film rejects the flattening narrative of tragedy. Instead, it posits Palestinian Futurism - a framework where those in exile are not merely survivors, but the architects of a liberated cultural and political future.

title: Over the Threshold
overview: Teenagers Danijela and Branko, newlyweds find themselves overwhelmed by wedding traditions. When they feel they can no longer breathe, they decide to run away from their own wedding party into the cold night.

title: Wet Paper Bag
overview: A former investigative journalist goes undercover at a psychedelic wellness center to find her missing sister. What she uncovers is far more unsettling than she expected.  Wet Paper Bag is a psychological drama that explores identity, control, and the quiet tension beneath carefully constructed lives.

title: Ehrenamt
overview: The documentary aims to provide an insight into the workings of the non-profit Metal Diver e.V. from the Sauerland region and, at the same time, to highlight the importance of volunteering in rural areas and the challenges and importance of cultural associations for the music world.

title: All the Seasons Pass Me Over Too
overview: Monica, a young college student must come face to face with her relationship with Ben.

title: Conversations with My Dead Friends
overview: Claire was my childhood love. I heard Yonatan, a kibbutznik, lecturing on Marx and Tolstoy the day we both enlisted. Jacques was a painter; the sergeant major ordered him to smear the cannons with grease so they would shine in the parade. I met Hanoch after the army; every morning I would wake to the clatter of his typewriter—he was then writing "Solomon Grip." With Shmuel I played chess; I loved the quiet that accompanied the game. Era, the editor, was my cinematic conscience. My friends are no longer here. But I still speak to them through the memories.

title: Matador Bolero
overview: New York nightclub, The Matador, becomes the site of a high-profile murder that attracts the attention of an obsessive detective, a TV news reporter, and an elusive being living outside the realms of time and space. Their stories converge with that of a new-age cult operating at the command of an ultra-intelligent supercomputer named Bolero.

title: Last Rain On My Parade
overview: A hair washer confronts her loneliness on the city's most turbulent night.

title: Gokaiger Goseiger Super Sentai 199 Hero Great Battle: Movie Release Commemorative Special
overview: A televised special to commemorate the theatrical release of Gokaiger Goseiger Super Sentai 199 Hero Great Battle, commeorating the 35th anniversary of the Super Sentai franchise.

title: Beyond Yesterday
overview: After seeing his past flash before his eyes, a man named Robby dives deep into his memories as he tries to escape his emotions and tries to look beyond yesterday.

title: L’uomo a cui hanno rubato il cuore
overview: A former worker, convinced that the factory stole his heart to make him more productive, becomes the protagonist of a television investigation that reveals the dark side of the world of work. A system that governs workers' bodies and lives, where individual distress is transformed into a problem to be managed: every institutional voice contributes to neutralizing the conflict, transforming what isn't productive into individual fragility, a paranoia.

title: Among people
overview: The girl lives in her own little bubble, which collides with the harsh, sharp edge of reality.

title: The Brave Swing
overview: These days, Cheng-Cheng seems different. He doesn’t play baseball anymore and stays away from the field. It feels like he has something he can’t tell anyone. His mom tries to help but doesn’t know why. The fear and confusion come from one of the adults he trusts the most. One evening, Cheng-Cheng stands by the field, holding his bat, wondering—should he swing, or not?

title: 5 Bomoh
overview: Plot Unknown.

title: Сон с буквой Ы
overview: Vyksa is a Celebration: A documentary about how an art festival transforms a small town and its residents.

title: Impossible Mission
overview: When secret agents Broad Bean and Chickpea spot their nemesis, agent Pigeon, carrying an important briefcase, the two agents launch a desperate chase to recover the classified contents before it’s too late.

title: The Gaon Family Show
overview: To all, it appeared as if I grew up in a normal home: a house on a Moshav, with sprinklers watering the yard. My Mother was a kindergarten teacher, and my Father was a farmer. In the nineties, my parents decided to give up their orchards. Instead, they opened a business selling gasoline to other farmers. The business grew, but it was poorly run from our home between the baskets of laundry, piles of cash being counted next to pots of couscous. Everything smelled of gasoline. My Mother pleaded with my Father to sell the business, but he ignored her. Not long afterward, she became ill, and the business collapsed. Our family fell apart. What caused the destruction of my charismatic family that everyone always thought was so perfect?

title: James: Getting Away with It
overview: The first-ever authorised tell-all documentary about iconic British band James.

title: Spirits Talk
overview: A grieving woman’s reality and memories begin to blur as her adoptive mother, Mother Nikki, reaches out to her from the spirit realm. She must speak to her mother one last time—or risk losing the ability to love herself and others.

title: The Last Solution
overview: Within the confines of a massive wall, a group of children plays as if there were no tomorrow

title: OH BOYS
overview: In a coastal village obsessed with standing out, through flashy solos, fierce ping pong matches, and clumsy dates, a young saxophonist takes a different path.

title: Feast or Famine
overview: A documentary following the London restaurant Angelina, its chefs and owners, over the span of three months, as they strive to achieve their ultimate goal of winning their first Michelin star.

title: The Space of the Dream
overview: In a post-human world where dreams have vanished, a solitary woman wanders through silent cities, carrying with her memories of love and humanity that endure despite the desolation.

title: Out of the Blue
overview: A film shoot is thrown into disarray when six-year-old Emily becomes distressed during an emotionally charged scene. As tensions rise between cast and crew, her mother reveals a buried childhood trauma that has been unintentionally triggered. Confronted with the weight of this revelation, the director must make difficult decisions to protect Emily’s sense of safety and agency while keeping the production on track. In doing so, the set becomes more than a workplace, it becomes a space where trust is rebuilt, boundaries are respected, and a painful memory is gently transformed.

title: Daughters of the Late Colonel
overview: After the death of their ill-tempered and controlling father, two middle-aged sisters find themselves at a loss.  An unexpected visitor sparks the courage in them to begin their lives anew.. ‘Daughters of the Late Colonel’ is a merry, rude, and lyrical, animated adaptation of the modernist short story of the same name, written by Katherine Mansfield in 1920.

title: Holy Joe
overview: When two altar boys stumble across their priest secretive misdeeds, they plot out an intricate plan to save their parish.

title: It's Not a Fish
overview: On a quiet summer day, Florence walks through the suburban streets she's known forever. Strange encounters, burnt toast...and a hamster to bury.

title: When You Wake Up
overview: When Finn, a boy from a small village, sees his best friend in drag at a party, his world turns upside down. Drawn into an unfamiliar queer nightlife, he begins leading a double life that slowly starts to collapse back into one. Along the way, he must confront not only his feelings towards his friend, but also towards himself.

title: In Search Of The Grey Bird With Green Stripes
overview: Short film selected for the Cannes Film Festival Directors’ Fortnight Lineup.

title: Mystic Melodies Reprise
overview: Seeking escape from the walls that keep her trapped, Aliki turns to the hidden and dangerous world of music. A story taken from the half-forgotten remains of a film that was never released.

title: Day by day
overview: In a time when more and more people are forced to live on the streets of big cities, we observe a day in the life of nine homeless individuals in Lisbon. The camera focuses on Nelson, Francisco, and Gonçalo, who swing between street life and the homeless shelter, yet continue to hope and plan for their future.

title: trace001
overview: A collection of video testimonials that chronicle a metaphysical journey beyond the boundaries of existence. This is a documentary that follows the artist Gammatrace, who, through his digital avatar, explores a unique metaphysical realm. In this void, matter and thought merge to give rise to “manifestations”: eternal forms that are consumed only by distance and fog. These manifestations can only be observed and understood, not interacted with. The documentary portrays this desolate yet comforting space as a deep stream of consciousness that branches off in unexpected directions.

title: 1 MAYIS 2025 İRADESİ
overview: A documentary that tells the story of the youth who, despite all forms of state repression, demonstrated their determination to march to Taksim on May 1, 2025.

title: The Pirate Queen: No Safe Waters
overview: The Pirate Queen: No Safe Waters (2026)  Legendary Pirate Queen Cheng Shih tells her story of her rise to power as the woman who commanded the largest pirate fleet in history in this cinematic immersive experience premiering in competition at Cannes Film Festival.

title: Invisible Ink
overview: A young man processes the aftermath of the obscene relationship between him and an older man.

title: Forse farfalle
overview: A boy, alone in his room, watches archive videos and falls obsessively in love with the girl trapped in them, like an insect locked in a cage to be observed.

title: Esther
overview: The whole world was enthusiastic about Esther, but the Germans were hypnotized. Esther and Abi Ofarim appeared to them not only as representatives of a musical internationalism… but above all as messengers of Israel and a new generation that might find ways of reconciliation.

title: Космическая Машка
overview: Masha spent her entire 11 years of life with her cosmonaut father at the spaceport. She knows how to fly a plane, a boat, and take responsibility for herself, but she doesn't know how her peers live. To make friends and get used to life on Earth, she goes to a regular school in St. Petersburg, where her incredible adventures begin.

title: Roll the Clip!
overview: Upcoming mockumentary short film from Andrew Reid.

title: EA6 - film surprise
overview: Vincent Dieutre returns to wander through an unfamiliar city, following paths that fork through clearings, ponds, and tree-lined avenues. Like a moving diary, fleeting encounters, reflections on the water, and voice-overs seem to weave together desire, memory, and loss. A wide-eyed flânerie in which every moment seems to hold a fragment of cinema already seen or dreamed, evoking the sentimental geometries of beloved filmmakers. Between intimate confession and sensory drift, Dieutre transforms the landscape into an emotional archive: past lovers reemerge like ghosts among the trees, while the present dissolves into a continuous overlapping of times. The film, suspended between documentary and autofiction, extends the director’s autobiographical work, adding a new chapter in which the director’s body, the city, and cinema itself merge. It is a journey with no apparent destination, where the act of walking becomes a creative act and a form of survival.

title: Yumburra
overview: A lyrical portrait of Bruce Pascoe in the aftermath of Dark Emu living on his riverside farm, recharging and reflecting, as he tests out the theories proposed in his book.

title: Once Upon A Nightmare
overview: Nightmares make me blush

title: The Meteorite Gang
overview: A filmmaker arrives at a remote farm in northern Canada, where an old school bus conceals a massive rock believed to be a priceless meteorite. The search for truth blurs the line between fact and fiction.

title: Sleeping At Last: Light Carries On
overview: A journey through the music and life of Sleeping At Last’s Ryan O’Neal, as he faces anxiety, grief, and the loss of his mother. Through returning to the stage, he begins to embrace healing and rediscover hope.

title: Nightmares Unleashed 2: Joseph's Revenge
overview: The Nightmare Never Ends as Raven must face her nightmares one last time, however Joseph knows how she is and is pulling out all the stops this time to finally claim his prize...Raven herself.

title: Yuho No Border
overview: Yuho Asaka was born in the 1950s with osteogenesis imperfecta – brittle bone disease. Growing up in less inclusive times, her childhood was far from easy. Yet she overcame prejudice and became a pioneer for disability rights.

title: My own worst enemy
overview: In 90s working-class Bromley, 15 year old Danny bullies classmates to hide his own pain. Behind his tough exterior lies a fractured family and dreams of escape. To get away from this life he goes skateboarding and exploring with his friends around south London.

title: Haunters
overview: A woman returns to her childhood home after a death in the family. Amidst a surreal drive down winding midwestern roads, she attempts to reconcile where she came from with who she's become.

title: How'd It Go?
overview: A rising stand-up comedian deals with bombing during his big break.

title: It's All in the Soil
overview: Every year, Moira tries to win her local gardening competition against longtime title holder and rival neighbour, Margaret. This year she wishes to take Margaret down and will do anything to claim the winning title.

title: Cosa faremo da grandi
overview: Drawing on interviews conducted with a fifth-grade class, "What Will We Do When We Grow Up" is a journey of discovery into the world of work, an intergenerational dialogue on what work might look like in the future.

title: Tiger's Rampage
overview: A bachelorette party in the woods becomes a fight for survival when a Bengal tiger escapes the zoo during a storm. Trapped without phone service or escape routes, the women must outwit the predator stalking their cabin.

title: 93 'Til
overview: A struggling artist painter on the brink of eviction and a vintage curator haunted by inherited dreams skip the corporate future they're supposed to want and spend one day discovering whether love is worth the risk.

title: Moshe Mizrahi – Climbing the Mountain
overview: Michal Bat-Adam films her life with her partner, Oscar-winning director Moshe Mizrahi, and their son Daniel. A story of their life walking on parallel paths, struggling to maintain their love and creative partnership even when the sea separates them.

title: Saved by the Ball
overview: A few days after October 7, the players of the Kfar Aza soccer team who survived the terrible day decided they will survive only by rebuilding their team and play soccer.

title: The Woman in White
overview: An intimate portrait following the mysterious life of Tamar Golan, who stood at the center of many of Israel’s foreign relations successes and operated behind the scenes of diplomacy. Yet her name remained absent from official historical records. Until now.

title: Plüss – one awakens to live, another to die for
overview: Loosely based on Jörg Steiner's «DER KOLLEGE» tells the story of the unemployed MAX PLÜSS. He moved to Biel more than 45 years ago. Today, Plüss learns that he has been «taxed out» and has to apply for social welfare. This surprises him, but does not depress him – despite the winter, cold and high fog.

title: 4 days with Marianne
overview: Marianne moves into her sister’s apartment while she’s away . All she wants is a quiet August in Paris, yet the coming days will upend her expectations.

title: Los ilusos 13 + 13
overview: 13 years after the premiere of "Los ilusos", the film that established the talent of director Jonás Trueba returns to cinemas with a new version that incorporates the original color of the filming, unpublished until now, and proposes a dialogue between both materials.

title: A Thing of the Past
overview: A pharmaceutical trial promises Aya her lost memories, but as they return, her body begins to manifest them in disturbing ways.

title: Justiciar
overview: A reclusive man is forced to reckon with the Ghosts of his past

title: Jhimmiki
overview: A young woman struggles against harassment and judgment in a society that refuses to hear her.

title: Entity
overview: Gwen, a college student grappling with a chaotic life, succumbs to a spiralling path of tragic insanity as a sinister paranormal being takes watch, feeding off of the growing anxiety consuming her.

title: Me in a Nutshell
overview: A dimwitted yet curious creature gets stuck in a nutshell and does everything in his power to break out.

title: B.E.W.B
overview: Three fierce spies who specialize in eliminating the worst men alive go head-to-head with their former teammate (and former lover) when she breaks back into the Bureau — only to discover the deadliest battle may be the one between their past.

title: Whispers of Forgotten Videos
overview: this is not my fault. this is not his fault. this is your fault.

title: Change of the Crooks
overview: Two women meet in prison and plan an escape, with any means necessary.

title: O Mother, Where Art Thou?
overview: A short comedy about a socially awkward 20-something who attends a speed-dating event to find a 'replacement' mother, only to realise that she might be better off without one

title: Kichka: Telling Myself
overview: At age 67, after reaching the top of the illustration world in Israel and beyond, Michel Kichka was forced to give up his place at the Bezalel Academy in favor of the younger generation. As a cartoonist, he documented the Zionist dream and its upending: a new and enthusiastic Zionist who came from Belgium to help in the Yom Kippur War turned prophet of doom. The evolution of his cartoons reflects a general deterioration of values ​​across Israeli society, politics, and the memory of the Holocaust. With his talent, he turned into a “rough Jerusalemite” with a Belgian accent who is not afraid to tell us the truth to our faces. To heal himself from the burden of the second generation, Kichka created a graphic novel revealing everything about his family and his father’s silence that led to a family tragedy. This work about the second generation was turned into an animated French feature film that tries to remind the younger generation of the Holocaust.

title: Georgy Guryanov
overview: The story of the drummer of Kino and the main fashionista of perestroika Leningrad.

title: Missoula
overview: Montana 1998. The lives of a wide kaleidoscope of characters intertwine in a dramatic fashion as the romance between Clara-Belle and Rebecca tightens.

title: De film van Rutger, Thomas & Paco 2
overview: The sequel to 'De film van Rutger, Thomas & Paco'

title: Go Fish 2
overview: Years after a game that was never meant to end, the cards are dealt once more.  What begins as a casual night of UNO among strangers is quietly interrupted by a man who has seen the game before… and survived it. As familiar patterns begin to resurface, the players find themselves slipping into roles that aren’t theirs—voices, memories, and unfinished conflicts bleeding through each turn.  Possession becomes participation. Guilt becomes gameplay.  And the past refuses to stay buried.  As the lines between player and pawn blur, one truth emerges:  Some games don’t end.  They wait.

title: STOP THE WORLD I WANT TO GET OFF
overview: The complex relationship between parent and child from childhood to adulthood has affected Florence's life in unthinkable ways.  She must now navigate whether to sever ties for good...or whether to give her father another chance.

title: Ink Between the Lines
overview: After the devastating suicide of her best friend Coli, 15 year old Natalie turns to journaling to cope with her overwhelming grief. Struggling with guilt and isolation, she pours her emotions onto the page and joins a support group for teens. A deep conversation with Ezra, a friend who understands silent pain, inspires her to transform her journal entries into a novel. As Natalie writes, she begins to confront hidden truths about her friendship with Coli, unspoken struggles, and the weight of what was left unsaid. Through storytelling, she finds healing, connection, and the courage to speak the truth—not just for herself, but for others who need to hear it.

title: Matches
overview: After matching with a famous actor on a dating app, Ryan is invited to a party at his mansion and is unexpectedly thrown into a cutthroat competition for the actor’s heart.

title: Pee Pressure
overview: When arts student Larry Beamish decides to take a stand against the urinary pressures of public bathrooms, he becomes an instant sensation on campus, attracting the reverence of many and the criticism of others. Reporting for the university’s TV station, tireless journalist Julia Stauber documents Beamish’s rise to fame, all while trying to maintain her cool with the station’s idiosyncratic anchor, Anvil Burnett, as well as the many colourful characters along the way

title: N's Last Game
overview: N. undergoes Compulsory Medical Treatment that kills him: it is the epilogue of a violent encounter with psychiatry, which fails to provide him with support and pathologizes his pain until he becomes yet another victim of the system. To say goodbye to life and accept his death, N. embarks on a journey through his memories, accompanied by the voice in his mind.

title: Lie-ability
overview: A boy’s parents go on an impromptu trip to their family cabin only to not return when they were supposed to. As time develops, lies begin to get uncovered and the innocence of their boy starts to get questioned. Based on real events.

title: Noiseman
overview: The documentary "Noiseman" presents a middle-aged man, Aurilios Koukoutsis, who owns a record store and is involved in DJing. In the documentary we learn his story but at the same time it becomes clear that he is one of the few people who have reached almost sixty and continue to do their hobby and what they love despite family obligations, financial difficulties, etc. In the documentary we see him and a regular friend of his unfolding their stories regarding the store, Aurilios talking to us directly about his life and a night of action as a DJ.

title: The Siege of Paradise
overview: In Cinque Terre on Italy’s northern Riviera, fewer than 3,000 locals endure over four million tourists each summer.  Across one chaotic season, six very different lives play out in parallel, revealing a sharply funny and surprisingly tender story of paradise under pressure in the age of social media driven tourism.

title: Lights on the Shore
overview: In northern Morocco, a massive fence looms over the landscape. Within it lies 12 square kilometers of Europe. The port of Melilla is one of the last remaining outposts of Spanish colonialism in Africa and a place where different cultures intersect. Distant voices tell the stories of the city. Caught between the colonial past and modern migration policies, they offer a glimpse into life at one of the most militarized borders in the world

title: A Life in Colour
overview: Lucy, an aspiring artist escapes into dreamlike visions through mysterious vials. As fantasy consumes her, she must choose which world to live in.

title: Princess in the Time of Coronavirus
overview: During the Great Coronavirus Quarantine of the 21st Century, Queen Elizabeth asks everyone to stay inside. A young and joyful princess in her castle tries to do her best, before going depressed, while she has stayed all alone.

title: Valencia - Chapter IV: Albacete
overview: The fourth entrance in The Valencia Saga.  With no one believing the events in Asturias, Dion's situation takes an even more sinister turn.

title: No Greater Evil
overview: Lenny doesn't make it a full day before he's back to his old ways. Hours after walking out of jail, he's behind the wheel of a stolen car - freedom and crime have always been the same reflex for him. He shows up at his cousin Tommy's door framing it as a reunion. Tommy sees through it immediately. He's been working hard to build something stable - a job, a future, a baby on the way. The last thing he needs is Lenny and whatever chaos follows him. But Lenny has always had a way of making bad ideas sound manageable, and eventually Tommy's resistance gives out.  The target is a convenience store. Simple in, simple out. It doesn't go that way. The two of them flee the scene with more problems than they arrived with, including a disturbing discovery that reframes everything, and the growing realization that someone has been watching them long before things went wrong. With no good options and the situation worsening by the mile, the night closes in.

title: Crimson Red
overview: A renowned detective stumbles upon a striking and peculiar evidence on what seems to be his most challenging case yet.

title: Somnophiliac
overview: intrusive conversations about the "social" animal - inspired by Madvin Mexis' graphic novel "I did not write this"

title: Twisted Retreat
overview: Four friends on a weekend retreat unravel secrets, sparking tension and betrayal. A game of Truth or Dare turns sinister as an unseen killer stalks them. Paranoia rises, trust shatters, and one by one, they fall—until a shocking truth changes everything.

title: Turn It Up!
overview: An indie rock band struggling to make its mark finds a possible meal ticket in an infectious new guitar riff. Unfortunately, it’s also a cursed melody that just so happens to open a portal to another, much scarier dimension.

title: Domna and it's late night friendships
overview: At the top of Thessaloniki there is a tavern that has not turned off its lights for eighty years. Marginals, intellectuals and all kinds of patrons have passed through the tables of the legendary "Domna" with folk music accompanying them from generation to generation. Our 12-minute documentary observes the atmosphere of "Domna" through the flow of a night. During the course of this evening the patrons gradually free themselves, surrender to drink and folk music and eventually turn into a big family.

title: The Film About Edith
overview: The day she starts speaking Swedish, 28-year-old Norwegian Edith also dreams herself into the center of a movie. But it turns out that changing languages isn’t enough to make her the main character.

title: Saturday Night's Main Event XLIV
overview: Saturday Night's Main Event XLIV will take place on May 23, 2026, from Fort Wayne, Indiana at Allen County War Memorial Coliseum. It will be the first WWE televised event in Fort Wayne since 2014.[34]

title: local color
overview: “My ultimate wish is that our whole party and people, united in struggle, build a  peaceful, unified, independent, democratic, and prosperous Vietnam... and make a  worthy contribution to the world revolution.” - Ho Chi Minh

title: Illu
overview: A screenwriter is on the lookout for new a rental house after the owners of his current home ask him to vacate the place.

title: The Last Derby Sha'arayim x Marmorek
overview: Daniel Gad steps for the first time into the role of director and creator, carrying a big question and a song in his heart, as he embarks on a personal journey alongside his father, a former player and club icon. Two adjacent neighborhoods in the city of Rehovot: Sha'arayim, founded in 1911 by immigrants from the Hidan region in Yemen, and Marmorek, established by immigrants from the Sharab region. Each has its own football team, founded in the late 1940s, with rich traditions and a long-standing rivalry so deep that even in the cemetery, a wall separates the communities. Maccabi Sha'arayim and Hapoel Marmorek – the Rehovot derby. Now, a new stadium is being built in the city. Will this dream unite them, or tear them apart forever?

title: Like The Rest
overview: After discovering an online ritual, a young teen uses it to grant his wishes, only to realize he won't get things how he wants them.

title: Dark Hours
overview: When a hacker hired by a mysterious entity discovers that there is more than one party interested in the task he was assigned, not only will his job be at risk, but also his life.

title: Cat in the Rain
overview: Classmates Samantha and Melissa get carried away while finishing a project for their high school English class.

title: Lettera a un amico lontano
overview: documentary short film

title: Otherwise Invent
overview: Altrimenti Inventa is an archival documentary that addresses the lack of representation of North African populations who migrated to Italy before the 1990s. It attempts an experimental reinvention of the missing archive, starting with the director's family history and then moving towards a more collective dimension, questioning the themes of identity, memory, and their relationship with what we choose to preserve and why.

title: Things Were Like That
overview: Meir Shalev left behind a profound literary and cultural legacy. Through his books and personal archive, the story of his life unfolds in his own voice: a story of a man, a family, and a land.

title: Countenance
overview: Asha is a young man with the ability to feel and resonate other people's emotions through physical contact. Turned into a recluse by the burden of his abilities, he is constantly plagued with the predicament of whether he should strip people of their negative emotions but consequently bare the burden himself or does he turn a blind eye, and leave people to their suffering?

title: Type Slowly
overview: Aspiring screenwriter Louis has finally caught a big job but what looks like his dream come true turns out to be much harder than he thought. With help from his spiritually lost and borderline-alcoholic best friend, Pierre, he takes on the challenge.

title: Cosmic Egg
overview: The Snake lays the Cosmic Egg, which births the Cosmos. The Cosmos can only exist until it is time for it to die, and for the next one to be born.

title: Boomer Rebirth
overview: In the near future, a man struggles to order fast food.

title: Lips
overview: The story of "Lips" — a wedding band from Sderot that brought the Moroccan language and rhythm from peripheral celebrations to the forefront of the Israeli mainstream.

title: Love( ) Mave
overview: The journey of Mavis, a 23 year old writer based in New York, who's longing for love has had a turbulence lately; despite living the "happily ever after" with her long term boyfriend - Rehan. Being the gifted writer that she is, ironically she can't seem to find the words to express the sudden shift of feelings towards her partner. Tackling themes such as guilt, love, and falling out of it; Love ( ) Mave explores what it's like to be in love with someone with all your being, but just not the way as you had before and all the strings of intimacy in between.

title: VENDETTA-THE BEAST WITHIN
overview: An assassin’s brutal past collides with fate, igniting relentless revenge.

title: Helix
overview: The Eyetherium Corporation creates Helix, a surgical replicant designed to operate flawlessly, assisted by the artificial intelligence NOX. But when, during a surgery, he hesitates and the patient dies, what seems like a human gesture is immediately registered as a flaw that needs to be fixed. A dystopian thriller that pushes the boundaries between consciousness and efficiency, between artificial perfection and human imperfection.

title: Tickling the Devil
overview: Christopher Morris took part in 28 wars. Armed with a photographic camera, he documented bloody conflicts across the world. Today, he tries to lead a peaceful family life, but the demons of war continue to haunt him, and turbulent American reality calls out to him at every turn.

title: PVPILL*
overview: A documentary featuring archive footage that blends fascism with fantasy.

title: Sprawa nr
overview: After an "unfortunate incident" at an e-commerce warehouse, Aneta, a young manager, testifies before the committee and takes part in a reconstruction of the events.

title: It's More Than Flesh, Sharpen the Knife
overview: Mikey's only known isolation. He's become familiar with the shape of loneliness, knows all it's nooks and crannies. that all changes with the arrival of Cameron. Unfortunately, their friendship is doomed as Cameron takes a leave from the realm of the living. Mikey, reeling from the grief of Cameron's death, comes back home in search of comfort. Only to find Cameron there, once again. Haunting him.

title: Warriors
overview: A group of young dreamers, the Guerreros, a third-division team from Autlán, Jalisco. sustained by faith, by the roar of their people, face the most decisive match of their career: the championship final. Ninety minutes stand between them and glory.

title: Abaddon
overview: A stream of archival footage reconstructs the dark face of humanity, revealing the chain of violence that binds our species to animals, to the Earth, and ultimately to itself. Abaddon is a visual requiem, an act of remembrance and denunciation where the specially composed sound guides the viewer through a deep and unsettling sensory experience.

title: La forma
overview: An archive of personal photos and a voiceover tell the story of the dissipation of memory after the loss of sight.

title: Twig
overview: Over the course of a summer day at the skate park, a determined 10-year-old boy struggles to land the simplest trick. As he attempts to drop into the pool, he uncovers a group of skaters, their troubled pasts, and something deeper within himself.

title: my plastic lung
overview: A disabled teenager with fake, plastic lungs that need to be operated by another person,  begins to lash out against his family.

title: 200 G
overview: Prof. Franco Fossi thinks he can get away with drugs, shady business, and blackmailing students. He has no idea a brutal reality check is coming.

title: Ivry Who?
overview: Paris, 2016. At two in the morning, a young filmmaker in crisis meets his 93-year-old neighbor — the legendary, mercurial violinist Ivry Gitlis. Their unexpected bond ignites a five-year odyssey into the soul of a forgotten genius, to help understand why Ivry was virtually erased from the official records.

title: Lúcido
overview: Gil learns to control his dreams with the help of his boyfriend.

title: Pause
overview: While helping her grandmother with paperwork, a withdrawn young woman spends the day waiting among strangers in a municipal office, where passing encounters quietly begin to unsettle her isolation.

title: Essay: Doomed to Run
overview: Deeply personal cinematic journey between two worlds—Catholic Venice and Islamic Dagestan. Inspired by Joseph Brodsky’s essay *Watermark* and Merab Mamardashvili’s lectures on those “doomed to run,” I craft a film-essay about identity, the ache of existing between cultures, and the endless search for home. Through fragments of daily life and raw, intimate phone calls with my mother, I try to make sense of living on the border—between faiths, eras, wars, and pandemics.

title: Undressing Them
overview: Tori, anxious about a house party, spirals into a gender crisis. A mysterious figure, Boy, forces her to confront her identity, leading to a journey from despair to self-acceptance.

title: Pool BBQ
overview: Amy lives with her boyfriend in a trailer and works like crazy for the well-off in town. She keeps her head down and out of trouble but her boss has other ideas.

title: In Salita
overview: Ale is about to get married. His two best friends, Tom and Zenone, arrive at the ceremony and, prompted by Sara, a curious bridesmaid, begin to tell the story of what was supposed to be the perfect bachelor weekend. But when Ale shows up with his sarcastic fifteen-year-old sister Viola, everything changes. No luxury hotel, no excess: just camping tents, mountain trails, and a lot of (emotional) endurance. Alternating between present and flashback, between jokes and internal breakdowns, the protagonists discover that growing up is scary, but doing it together might just make it easier.

title: Black Trumpet
overview: After 10 years of living abroad, the famous writer Maksim Grahovac returns to his birthplace, the Montenegrin village of Grahovo, with the intention of visiting his brother and agreeing on the estate that was left to them as an inheritance.

title: Kumbh
overview: The high-stakes Nepali action-thriller that follows a gritty protagonist named Raghu as he asserts his dominance and confronts enemies in a world defined by conflict and power struggles

title: On Cats And Humans
overview: Sunčica, an author and veterinarian, re-examines her own ethical position on her journey, building a portrait of the Croatian islands through the attitudes of the local population on the castration of free-ranging cats. When faced with surgery on her own body, her empathy deepens, as she begins to relate her position to the fate of the animals she cares for.

title: Queer Blue Sky
overview: After realizing many of the best parts of their relationship were maybe kind of queer, Beth and Chris decide to break up in a queer way too.

title: No Compromises, Belgrade
overview: Two friends travel to Belgrade to explore a music scene that exists outside state funding and institutional support. Moving through trap, hardcore, and alternative rock collectives, they meet artists who create their own creative spaces under difficult conditions. The talent, ambition, and hospitality of Serbia’s musicians leave them deeply impressed.

title: LAISHA - The Story of a Women's Magazine
overview: Since 1947, "La'Isha" has been Israel's top women's weekly. This film explores the 78-year bond between the magazine and its readers. From its male-led early years and beauty pageants to its feminist evolution, the magazine provided a "room of one's own" while fueling body image debates.

title: Abu Salie
overview: Twenty years after shooting the film Souvenirs, Shahar lives in Amsterdam, raising two Dutch-Yemeni children, just like the grandchildren his late father had longed for. He runs the best falafel food truck in town, employing refugees from all over the world. His son Salie, is a 14-year-old adolescent with a sharp tongue and plenty of criticism. Embarrassed by Shahar’s market job, he wants his father to open a respectable restaurant. Shahar dreams of a restaurant too, but cares more about the refugees he would need to let go. The solution comes from Salie, who starts to grasp what truly matters in life.

title: I want a president
overview: 1992. United States of America. Bush and Clinton are presidential candidates, as is Myles, a candidate who at the time identifies as a woman, working-class, and openly lesbian. The issue inspires a poem to Zoe Leonard. 2024. The poem was augmented with new demands and translated into Acadam, a post-binary language, by the Bye Bye Binary collective.

title: D’Amore si cresce
overview: ‘D’Amore si cresce’ is a project focusing on visual literacy, emotional education and participatory cinema, which has led to the creation of a collective film.

title: Ostatnia dzika rzeka
overview: Dr Struzynski spent decades fighting for the survival of noble crayfish. A documentary journey into nature, between fairy tale and reality, reflecting on resilience, dedication, and belief that even one person can change the world.

title: Rooms of Her Own
overview: Returning home, a queer filmmaker finds their mother awakened to a new understanding beyond patriarchy, as the two reconcile amidst a past shaped by unspoken pain.

title: The Love Situation
overview: A teen in love overthinks an unlikely situation only to see it unfold in front of his eyes. Abby cheated on Logan for Bentley, Brynlee cheated on Bentley for Logan, Logan cheated on Abby for Brynlee, and Bentley cheated on Brynlee for Abby.

title: Райский сад
overview: This project is dedicated to the memory of my family's life in Armenia in the 1990s, the so-called "Dark Years." During those years, there was no electricity in Armenia, meaning there was no heat or light in our homes.

title: Соседи в поместье лорда Голефорнака
overview: An adventure film about a group of friends who drank wine, made films, and recorded music at a dacha in the Moscow region.

title: Retrospective
overview: A behind-the-scenes look at the show of the Collectible Pieces collection by Ural fashion house Ushatava at the Garage Museum.

title: Dressing Up Together
overview: Elly travels from Berlin to Michigan to visit her grandfather Dixie. Their long-standing email correspondence, begun after their respective queer coming-outs in 2015, finally takes shape in person, revealing mismatched expectations: Dixie associates queerness with physical connection, while Elly does not.

title: The Beast of Gevautwo
overview: Six months after the events of the first film, we find the mayor still alive at the bar, the beast is striking again, so they’ll have to fight back...

title: Bert's Dilemma
overview: Bert and his girlfriend aren't doing too good... it's looking like splitsville for them... unless Bert steps up. But when a mysterious, beautiful, delicious Gyro comes into his life, Bert must choose between his beloved girlfriend and his beloved Gyro... and protect the Gyro against all those that would take it from him...

title: Chakravaat
overview: Trapped in an endless time loop, a desperate human races against the clock to escape a relentless cycle of terror. With every reset, shadowy figures emerge from the darkness—silent, unstoppable, and closing in for the kill. As reality frays at the edges, he must unravel the mystery of the loop before the shadows claim him forever. A gripping, atmospheric horror short that blends suspense, mystery, and unrelenting dread.

title: Aphasic correspondences
overview: An audiovisual essay constructed from Super 8 footage filmed during camera tests for the short film ‘La Trampa’. Through gestures, light, and silences, it reflects on what the image reveals and what it leaves unsaid.

title: Sealed in Scars
overview: How many marks remain on a predestined body? Born and raised in the macumba tradition of Imperatriz, the young priest Carlos Lourenço reflects on a path of pain and learning.

title: Betting Zoo
overview: In a gambling-oriented society, Orla battles with her crumbling relationship and having to leave her life up to pure chance or returning to the Betting Zoo; a gameshow where masked racers are imprisoned until they win.

title: PART OF THE SYSTEM
overview: An experimental synthetic-documentary staged as a one-sided dialogue between c̴r̶e̴a̶t̴i̶v̷e̸ ̸w̴o̷r̴k̵e̷r̷s̸ and the system replacing them. The film questions authorship, consent, and the cost of convenience in times when tools begin to argue for themselves.

title: Céad Míle Fáilte
overview: A documentary that asks young people how they feel about Irelands culture when it comes to welcoming diversity. We narrow in on Sarah Sida, a model and college student born in South Sudan who shares with us what it was like growing up in Ireland as a black woman.

title: The Youngins
overview: He is from Torre del Bierzo, an industrial mining town, where the name El Chispas inherits from, working in the family workshop.  She is a city girl who avoids the summers in his village, Sueros de Cepeda. Floating on his skates.  In a hot summer of the 90s they bathe together in the Villameca swamp. Everything changes when they discover the open secret under its waters.

title: À Bétôt? Goodbye?
overview: Jèrriais, – a language on the edge of silence. An intimate portrait of Jèrriais, Jersey’s ancient native language, following the voices of its last native speakers and the growing movement fighting to keep it alive – but can it still be done?  This documentary is about a people – the people who spoke, and still speak, Jèrriais, Jersey’s ancient language. Passed down through generations of native speakers, it carries the island’s history and identity, yet in recent times has come perilously close to being lost. At the same time, a growing movement is working to revitalise the language – driven by people who care passionately about the importance of Jèrriais as a vital part of Jersey’s culture, heritage and inclusive identity. Ultimately, this film is a call to action. A rallying cry to a new generation of enthusiasts, learners and speakers to take up the challenge and ensure this precious language can thrive once again.

title: Kaktus Kneipe
overview: In the cold of the Berlin winter, regulars gather every evening in a timeless bar: ‘the Kaktus’. In this increasingly rare kind of place, where everything is an excuse to play and have fun, everyone finds warmth and a place to share their secrets.

title: Руководство по работе с оцифрованным архивом
overview: The video work revolves around a single bicycle ride—from the author's home to the home of his grandfather, who is supposed to hand over tapes from his personal archive for digitalization. While the visual component is entirely focused on the meditative spin of the wheels, the narrative is detached from the image.

title: Flowers of Acacia
overview: Inspired by a true story, Flowers of Acacia follows wedding orchestra dancers whose dreams collide with the harsh realities of patriarchy and misogyny.

title: Mini Lizard
overview: At Elbit System's office in Göteborg Emma is worried about a new sickness causing deaths in the weapon industry, but soon her workplace is faced with another direct threat.

title: Sacré Bleu
overview: In 1969, socially awkward observer, Otto Mcguin agrees to play a lead role in his friend's movie in hopes of sparking a relationship between he and his mysterious on-screen lover, Adaline Kirkoff.

title: We All Are Cuchas
overview: In Medellín, Cuchas, a Queer punk band, challenges a scene that claims to be rebellious but rejects new forms of dissent. Through their music and daily lives, the documentary follows their journey of identity and resistance in an environment that makes their existence uncomfortable.

title: Left Unsaid
overview: Cas and Anna run into each other at a coffee shop long after they broke up. They miss each other, they regret everthing, but do they have the courage to tell each other?

title: House Rats
overview: A young documentarian joins an activist squat, who end up face to face with the rich owner of the house, the media and the law, causing tensions within the group.

title: Girlhood
overview: Katie is dead. Her ghost has just appeared in her best friend's room, bleeding and torn appart. What happened? And what can they do? And why did she come see her friends, one last time?

title: My Side of the Door
overview: Samantha has locked herself in the bathroom, and Christian won't leaver her alone. He just got his job across the Atlantic that he didn't tell her he applied to. Now they must choose: their careers; or their relationship? Can they come to actual communication from either side of the door?

title: The Original Sin
overview: A ridiculously wealthy father gifts his son Adam a girlfriend in an attempt to inspire his manhood.

title: Maps
overview: Julia and Sérgio set out in search of Rebeca, a missing cycling activist, moving through Brasília, a city marked by silence and unresolved histories. Their investigation leads them to forgotten tragedies, where ruins, memories, and unsettling presences begin to intertwine. Blurring the line between the real and the fantastic, Mapas unfolds as a journey through ghosts of the past that continue to echo in the present.

title: Confessions of a Serial Killer: Levi Bellfield
overview: A gripping true crime series exploring one of Britain’s most disturbing killers and the confessions that continue to haunt the justice system. Ex-DCI Colin Sutton  (Manhunt/The Real Manhunter) and his team re-examine the claims of serial killer Levi Bellfield, whose repeated and conflicting confessions to the 1996 murders of Lin and Megan Russell have reignited one of the country’s most controversial cases. With another man still serving life sentences for the crime, this series unravels a complex web of evidence, doubt and deception, asking whether Bellfield is manipulating the system from behind bars.

title: Ни смыт, ни обесцвечен
overview: In the film, the photo lab serves as a space of transformation and control. It's where slides belonging to my grandfather, an anesthesiologist, are printed. The film development and analog printing processes are juxtaposed with the operating table and hospital corridors: a sense of sterility and technological advancement, a symbiosis between medical practice and a hobby no less demanding of precise procedures.

title: The Gift
overview: After eight long years of grief, Monica - in an act of vengeance - captures the man responsible for her pain and suffering, but they both soon discover that the truth is far more complex and sickening.

title: Boop-Boop-a-Doop
overview: A revenge slasher based on Betty Boop, only surviving as promotional materials

title: The World Is Our Dance Floor
overview: Exactly one year after a tragedy, a young writer carries on through the night as though it were any other. What first appears ordinary gradually reveals itself as something far more fragile.

title: One Hundred and One Dalmatians
overview: When a litter of dalmatian puppies are abducted by the minions of Cruella De Vil, the parents must find them before she uses them for a diabolical fashion statement.

title: Lady and the Tramp
overview: Lady, a golden cocker spaniel, meets up with a mongrel dog who calls himself the Tramp. He is obviously from the wrong side of town, but happenings at Lady's home make her decide to travel with him for a while.

title: A Fistful of Dollars
overview: The Man With No Name enters the Mexican village of San Miguel in the midst of a power struggle among the three Rojo brothers and sheriff John Baxter. When a regiment of Mexican soldiers bearing gold intended to pay for new weapons is waylaid by the Rojo brothers, the stranger inserts himself into the middle of the long-simmering battle, selling false information to both sides for his own benefit.

title: The Sword in the Stone
overview: Wart is a young boy who aspires to be a knight's squire. On a hunting trip he falls in on Merlin, a powerful but amnesiac wizard who has plans for him beyond mere squiredom. He starts by trying to give him an education, believing that once one has an education, one can go anywhere. Needless to say, it doesn't quite work out that way.

title: From Russia with Love
overview: Agent 007 is back in the second installment of the James Bond series, this time battling a secret crime organization known as SPECTRE. Russians Rosa Klebb and Kronsteen are out to snatch a decoding device known as the Lektor, using the ravishing Tatiana to lure Bond into helping them. Bond willingly travels to meet Tatiana in Istanbul, where he must rely on his wits to escape with his life in a series of deadly encounters with the enemy.

title: Thunderball
overview: A criminal organization has obtained two nuclear bombs and are asking for a 100 million pound ransom in the form of diamonds in seven days or they will use the weapons. The secret service sends James Bond to the Bahamas to once again save the world.

title: You Only Live Twice
overview: A mysterious spacecraft captures Russian and American space capsules and brings the two superpowers to the brink of war. James Bond investigates the case in Japan and comes face to face with his archenemy Blofeld.

title: Lolita
overview: Humbert Humbert is a middle-aged British novelist who is both appalled by and attracted to the vulgarity of American culture. When he comes to stay at the boarding house run by Charlotte Haze, he soon becomes obsessed with Lolita, the woman's teenaged daughter.

title: Easy Rider
overview: Wyatt and Billy, two Harley-riding hippies, complete a drug deal in Southern California and decide to travel cross-country in search of spiritual truth.

title: On Her Majesty's Secret Service
overview: With the help of Marc-Ange Draco, head of the Unione Corse crime syndicate, and Draco's troubled daughter Tracy, James Bond tracks his archnemesis, Ernst Stravro Blofeld, to a mountaintop retreat in the Swiss Alps, where he is training an army of beautiful, lethal women.

title: West Side Story
overview: In Manhattan’s Upper West Side, rival gangs of Polish-Americans and newly arrived Puerto Ricans clash for control of the neighborhood, even as two young members from opposite sides fall dangerously in love.

title: To Catch a Thief
overview: When a string of jewel robberies hits the French Riviera, suspicion falls on retired thief John “The Cat” Robie. To clear his name, he sets out to trap the copycat himself—entangling a wealthy widow and her beguiling daughter in a seductive game of pursuit, deception, and desire.

title: My Fair Lady
overview: A snobbish phonetics professor agrees to a wager that he can take a flower girl and make her presentable in high society.

title: Blow-Up
overview: A successful mod photographer in London whose world is bounded by fashion, pop music, marijuana, and easy sex, feels his life is boring and despairing. But in the course of a single day he unknowingly captures a death on film.

title: Bullitt
overview: Senator Walter Chalmers is aiming to take down mob boss Pete Ross with the help of testimony from the criminal's hothead brother Johnny, who is in protective custody in San Francisco under the watch of police lieutenant Frank Bullitt. When a pair of mob hitmen enter the scene, Bullitt follows their trail through a maze of complications and double-crosses. This thriller includes one of the most famous car chases ever filmed.

title: Marnie
overview: Marnie is a beautiful but emotionally withdrawn thief, stealing from employers before disappearing under new identities. When her new boss, Mark Rutland, discovers her secret, his fascination turns to obsession, and he blackmails her into marriage, convinced he can cure her. But as he probes deeper into Marnie’s fractured mind, long-buried fears and compulsions begin to surface.
